id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0035
text:
2.根据分析，判断词性 根据题干的语法结构、空处前后的内容以及空处所充当的成分，并结合英语不同词性的单词的用法，考生可以很直观地判断出空处应填写哪种词性的单词。比如空前是一个不定冠词，且空处位于句尾，根据不定冠词修饰名词这一规则，可以判断出空处应填名词。
3.判断是否需要变形 结合句子的时态、语态、语气以及空处所充当的成分等，判断是否需要将单词变形。如果需要变形，应考虑如何变形，比如名词变为复数形式，动词变为过去式、第三人称单数形式、非谓语动词形式，添加词缀等。
第三节 试题举例及精讲 A 90-year-old has been awarded “Woman of the Year” for 1_(be) Britain’ s oldest full-time employee—still working 40 hours a week. Now Irene Astbury works from 9:00 a. m. to $5:00\;\mathrm{p\cdotm}$ . daily at the pet shop in Macclesfield, _ 2_ she opened with her late husband Les. Her years of hard work have _3(final) been acknowledged after a customer nominated( 提名) her for the Cheshire′s “"Woman of the Year". Picking up her “Lifetime Achievement'” award, proud Irene 4(declare) she had no plans 5(retire) from her 36-year-old business. Irene said, “I don't see any reason to give up work. I love coming here and seeing my family and all the friends I 6(make) over the years. I work not because I have to, 7 because I want to." Granddaughter Gayle Parks, 31—who works alongside her grandmother in the family business—said it remained unknown as to who nominated Irene for the award. She said, “"We don't have any idea who put grandma forward. When we got a call _8( say) she was shortlisted, we thought it was 9 joke. But then we got an official letter and we were shocked. We are proud of her. It's _10(wonder). "
1.【精析】being句意：一位 90 岁的老人被授予了“年度女性”，因为她是英国年龄最大的全职员工—她每周仍工作40 小时。根据空前的介词 for 可知，此处应用 be 动词的动名词形式作宾语，所以空处应填 being。
2.【精析】which句意:现在Irene Astbury每天从早上9点到下午5点在麦克尔斯菲尔德的宠物店工作，这家店是她和已故丈夫Les一起开的。分析句子结构可知，空处引导一个非限制性定语从句，且在从句中作 opened 的宾语，先行词是指物的the pet shop，所以空处应填which。
3.【精析】finally句意:她多年的努力工作终于在一位顾客提名她为柴郡的“年度女性”后被认可。根据空后的beenacknowledged可知，空处应填形容词final的副词形式finally(终于)。
4.【精析】declared句意:在领取“终身成就奖"时，骄傲的Irene宣布，她没有从(经营了)36 年的生意中退休的打算。根据句意和句中的had(动词have 的过去式)可知，此处描述的是过去发生的事情，应用一般过去时，所以空处应填declared(宣布)。
5.【精析】to retire句意参考上题解析。分析句子结构可知，空处应用非谓语动词，与空后的部分一起作后置定语，修饰名词 plans。当被修饰词是表示能力、企图、努力、倾向、目的、愿望、打算、意向、方法、机会等含义的抽象名词，如ability, attempt, effort, impulse, wish, desire , failure, plan, tendency, promise, method, way, chance, opportunity 等时，常用不定式(短语)作后置定语。根据句意可知，retire(退休)表示的动作在从句的谓语had 之后发生，应用不定式的一般式，所以空处应填toretire。
6.【精析】have made句意：Irene说，“我认为没有任何理由放弃工作。我喜欢来到这里，看望我的家人和我这些年来结交的所有朋友。我工作不是因为我必须工作，而是因为我想工作。”分析句子结构可知，friends后为省略关系代词that/who 的定语从句。根据从句中的时间状语 over the years(这些年来)可知，这里表示过去的某一动作或行为一直持续到现在，而且还有可能延续下去，应用现在完成时，即从句谓语动词用“have/has $^+$ 过去分词”的形式；从句的主语为 I，所以空处应填havemade。
7.【精析】but句意参考上题解析。not...but..是固定搭配，意为“不是....而是...”，所以空处应填 but。
8.【精析】saying句意：她说，“我们不知道是谁提名奶奶的。当我们接到电话说她被列人候选名单时，我们还以为是在开玩笑。但后来我们收到一封官方信件，我们感到震惊。我们为她感到自豪。这太棒了。”分析句子结构可知，此处应用非谓语动词，与空后的 she was shortlisted一起作状语。根据句意可知，a call 和 say(说)之间是逻辑上的主谓关系，且 say 表示的动作和 got a call 表示的动作几乎同时发生，应用现在分词的一般式，所以空处应填 saying。
9.【精析】a句意参考上题解析。 joke 泛指“一个玩笑”，且 joke 的发音是以辅音音素/d/开头的，所以空处应填不定冠词a。
10.【精析】wonderful句意参考第8题解析。根据空前的It's 可知，空处应用形容词作表语，所以空处应填名词wonder的形容词形式wonderful(极好的)。
小库考场 Exercise 1 The polar bear is found in the Arctic Circle and some big land masses as far south as Newfoundland. While they are rare at 88 degrees north, there is evidence l they range all the way across the Arctic, and as far south as James Bay in Canada. It is difficult to figure out a global population of polar bears because the range of polar bears has been 2( poor) studied; however, biologists calculate that there are about 20 ,000-25 ,000 polar bears worldwide.
Modern methods 3 tracking polar bear populations have been employed only since the mid 1980s, and they are 4(perform) consistently over a large area. In recent years some Inuit people in Nunavut 5(report) increases in polar bear sightings around human setlements, leading to a 6 (believe) that their populations are increasing. Scientists have responded by 7( note) that hungry polar bears may gather around human setlements, leading to the ilusion(错觉) that their populations are 8( large) than they actually are. Of 9 nineteen recognized polar bear subpopulations , three are declining, six _10(be) stable , one is increasing , and nine lack enough data.
Exercise There are several reasons why school uniforms are a good idea. First of all , uniforms help the school look smart. The students feel that they belong to a particular group. When every pupil in the school wears the uniform, nobody 1( have) to worry about fashion. Everybody wears 2 same style of clothes. Uniforms can be useful in unexpected ways. A school in Ireland has introduced an interesting new uniform. On the edge of the jacket, there is a piece of cloth 3 can give offlight in the dark. When the children are walking or 4(cycle) to school on dark mornings, car drivers can 5(easy) see them. But can uniforms help improve school standards? The answer _6 this question is not clear. One study in America found that students’ grades 7(improve) a little after the school introduced uniforms. But some students didn’t want 8( wear) the uniform. Other American studies showed no 9_( connect) between uniforms and school performance.
School uniforms are _10( tradition) in Britain, but some schools are starting to get rid of them. Some very good schools don’t have a uniform policy. However, uniforms are still popular. Pupils at about 90 percent of British schools wear uniforms.
答案在线 Exercise 1. that 3. of/for 5. have reported 7. noting 9. the 2. poorly 4. performed 6. belief 8. larger 10. are
Exercise 1. has/will have 3. that/which 5. easily 7. improved 9. connection/connections 2. the 4. cycling 6. to 8. to wear 10. traditional
第六章 写 作 考纲解读 写作部分测试考生用英语进行书面表达的能力，共15分。本部分选用考生熟悉的题材，要求考生能根据所给的提示，用英语写一篇简短应用文。要求格式规范、内容切题、条理清晰、语法正确、表达得体。
本部分要求考生应能： $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ 恰当地运用所学的词汇和语法知识，清楚、连贯地传递信息、表达思想，做到语句通顺、结构完整； $\textcircled{2}$ 熟练掌握书信、电子邮件等常用的应用文文体写作格式。
本部分测试考生综合运用英语表达思想的能力。考生应掌握《高职高专教育英语课程教学基本要求(试行)》要求的词汇和语法知识，并能正确、有效地运用所学语言知识，在规定的时间内写出一篇话题相符、中心明确、逻辑通顺、结构正确的作文。写作内容涵盖日常生活和一般常识，以及各种社会热点和现象等，因此考生要熟练掌握日常生活中使用的应用文文体写作格式，多积累常用的英语表达方式和亮点句型，以便在考试时提高写作效率。
小库提醒 小库课堂 第一节 应试指导 写作是一种基本的语言技能，写作技能的提升要求考生在具备扎实的英语语言基础知识的同时勤加练习。要想在本部分取得高分，除了要有丰富的知识储备外，考生在考试时还应注意以下几个方面。
1.注重效率，确保用时 本部分要求考生在规定的时间内完成一篇作文，如果时间分配不合理，那么就很难在规定的时间内高
质量地完成写作。因此，在平时的写作训练中，考生应该养成良好的习惯，注意合理分配时间，保证有充足的写作时间。
2.细读指令，认真审题 审题是写好文章的前提，审题的主要任务是弄清楚题目对文章内容及体裁的要求与限制，确定文章的中心思想。因此，在动笔写作之前，首先要认真阅读本部分的要求，确定写作类型，明确命题意图;其次要逐一揣摩提示的内容，确定写作要点；最后要确定时态和中心人称，避免原则性错误。
3.理清思路，构思布局 审题之后文章的大致方向就确定了，解决了“写什么”的问题。构思就是要确定文章的布局，解决“怎么写”的问题，即在脑海中勾勒出文章的框架，思考围绕主题应该写哪些内容，怎样安排段落，怎样开头和结尾，并确定可以使用的相关材料。
4.精选素材，列出提纲 在构思的基础上，按文章发展的逻辑顺序进一步确定每段的中心内容，列出段落主题句，并围绕中心思想从储备的知识中筛选出紧扣主题的素材，分段落排列顺序，最后整理成简略提纲。写作时应根据提纲进行写作，这样可以减少盲目性，增强逻辑性，从而避免遗漏要点、偏离主题。
5.语句准确，过渡自然 草拟提纲后，要根据主题和提纲列出的要点来扩展所阐述的观点，叙述的内容都应为主题服务，与主题无关的内容都应删掉。为了避免出现语法错误，考生应尽量使用自己熟悉、有把握的词语和句式，而不要过度使用复杂句，以免弄巧成拙。表达有困难时，可以借助同义词、近义词或其他句式进行表达，并保证在表达正确的前提下句与句之间过渡自然。一定不要编造词语，尽量避免使用生僻的单词和中式表达，还应注意字迹工整，单词拼写正确，标点符号使用无误，字数达标，卷面整洁。
6.认真检查，仔细修改 写完文章后要认真检查，应重点检查有无和主题不大相干的句子，有无语法错误、拼写错误、标点符号和大小写错误等，把因笔误或粗心而写错的地方及时更正过来，将差错率降到最低，但文章不宜做大的调整和改动，以保持卷面整洁。
第二节 信函类应用文写作 英语书信不同于普通文体写作，它不要求有华丽的辞藻，而注重表意的准确性。英美人士一般都倾向于用较为简明直接的语言写信。
一、英语书信的基本知识与写作要求 英语书信一般可分为两大类：正式书信和非正式书信。官方往来信件、商业信函、学术书信等一般都属于正式书信;而家信、亲朋好友的往来信件等私人信件一般都属于非正式书信。
英语书信的写作要求可概括为三字诀(ABC)：
1.准确(Accuracy) 意思表达要准确无误，重点突出，而且遣词造句要得体，不含糊其词。
2.简洁(Brevity) 文字力求简短精练，修饰语不宜过多。 3.清楚(Clarity) 信件的用词要浅显易懂，避免使用生僻词和怪词，尽可能少用长句或难句。叙述要注意主次分明，最好一件事分一个段落。
以上三个方面联系密切，缺一不可。此外，由于对象和目的不同，写信时要注意分寸。在任何情况下，都要注意礼貌。
二、英语书信的基本结构 英语书信一般可分为8个部分。在这8项中，1\~6项是书信的主要部分，第7项和第8项是否需要，则应视具体情况而定。考试时，一般只要求写第3\~6项。下面对这8项逐一加以说明。
1.信头 此项包括写信人的地址及写信日期，写在信笺的右上角。在正式信函中，还应包括写信人的单位名称、电话号码等，以便让收信人知道回信地址、联系方式等。在写地址时应注意英文和中文的区别，英文应先写小地方，再写大地方，即门牌号码、街道或路名，然后是区名、市名、省名，若邮往国外则应再添上国名。在写日期时美式英语习惯先写月，然后是日，而英式英语则习惯反过来写，接着再打一逗号，最后写年，如“2023年5月20日”应写为:May20,2023(美式)或20May,2023(英式)。
2.收信人的姓名和地址 此项包括收信人的姓名、职务和单位地址，顶格写在信笺的左边，信头下面一至两行处。按照英美人士的习惯，凡属公务、商业之类的正式书信，必须按信封上收信人的姓名、地址，在信笺左上方(信头之下)重写一次;私人信函等非正式书信可以省去这一项。地址的书写顺序同信头一致，但考试时一般不要求写地址。
3.称呼 称呼用于表示写信人对收信人的尊敬或亲切。称呼从信纸的左侧顶格写起，常位于收信人地址下面一行的位置，行首与收信人地址的第一行行首上下对齐。称呼有多种，视写信人与收信人的关系而定，其后一般加逗号，如 Dear Sir or Madam,Dear Bob,Dear Mr. Smith, Dear Mr. John Smith, Dear Uncle 等。
4.正文 正文是一封信中最主要的部分，信写得成功与否，关键在于正文。正文通常包括三个部分; $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ 写信的目的； $\textcircled{2}$ 要表达的具体内容； $\textcircled{3}$ 表示希望和祝福的话。在具体写作时应注意以下几点：
(1)格式要正确。正文是从称呼的下面一行开始。每段开始都应向右缩进四个字母。(2)条理要清晰。信中若涉及的事情单一，可用一段写完;若涉及的事情较多，应分成几段，逐一叙述。(3)书写要干净准确。字迹清晰工整，用词准确，注意单词拼写、大小写、标点符号等细节。(4)用词要讲究礼仪。写事务信件或公函时，不仅要表意清晰，还要学会用适当的客套语，这是表达礼
貌与客气不可缺少的一部分。如： I have the honor of informing you that... 荣幸告知.... I take this opportunity to inform you that...借此机会奉告..... Many thanks for your last kind letter.来信收悉，致以谢意。
如果是写给亲友和同学的信，一般用较轻松的、闲谈似的语言，只要能清楚表达意思即可。
5.致敬语(结束语) 信中要说的话写完之后，必须加上致敬语，通常位于正文下面，从靠右的地方写起。结尾致敬语有尊卑亲疏之分，与称呼相配合，写在正文结束的右下方，其后加逗号，开头第一个字母要大写。如：
(1)Respectfully yours/Yours respectfully用于写给地位高的人、老师或不是亲属的长辈。
(2)Verytrulyyours/Yours truly用于写给不太熟悉的人，表示客气。
(3)Faithfully yours/Yours faithfully用于写给政府机关的人，也可用于正式书信。
(4)Sincerelyyours/Yours sincerely用于写给熟悉的人，也可用于正式书信。
(5) Yours lovingly/Yours affectionately/Your loving father( mother, brother, son, niece, husband.. ) 用于写给亲属或家庭成员。
6.签名 写信人的签名一般是写在致敬语下面一至两行的地方。考试时，考生只用在致敬语下面一行处写上姓名(一般要求不出现真实姓名)，并与致敬语保持右对齐即可。
7.附件 如果书信还有附件，一般应在签名下方左下角注明 Encl.或Enc.，有时说明附件的件数，有时说明附件的内容。如：
(签名) Encl./Enc.：4invoices(附发票四张)Encl./Enc.：a doctor's certificate(附医生证明)
8.附言 此项是在信的正文书写完成后，又有新的情况需要告知收信人时才加上的。附言一般位于信笺的左下方，低于右边签名处，可用PS或P.S.标出。应注意，除非必要，否则最好不要使用附言，特别是在正式的书信中应尽量避免。即便使用也不能写太多，一两行就可以了。通常在给朋友或家人写信时，正文写完后想补充内容，可用此项。如：
(签名) PS/P.S. : If you are in need of anything, just write to me. I will help you to the best of my ability.
附言：如果你需要任何东西，写信给我就行。我将尽我最大的能力帮你。
PS/P. S. : Your parcel has just arrived after my writing the above. Thank you.
附言：在我写完以上内容后，你的包裹刚好到了。谢谢你。
英语书信的常用格式如下： P.O. Box 121 Peking University, Bejing,
China(写信人的地址)May 1,2023(写信日期)
[Pioneer Magazine No. 18, Guangming Road Guangzhou,Guangdong,China(收信人的地址) Dear Sir or Madam,(称呼)
I am writing to apply for the position of assistant editor advertised in the job advertisementl published by your WeChat official account.
source: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output

id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0036
text:
I feel confident that I can meet your requirements. First, I will graduate from Peking University with a bachelor' s degree in July this year. I take English as my major and journalism as my minor. Second, since my freshman year, I have been contributing articles to newspapers and magazines, which has greatly improved my writing skills. Most importantly, I have been working part-time for my university magazine for two years. Therefore, I am well acquainted with the editorship.
The reasons why I choose your magazine are as follows. On the one hand, your magazine' s employees are promoted because of their abilities rather than their backgrounds. On the other hand, your employees are said to have more opportunities for studying abroad.
I' ve enclosed my CV and one of my award-winning articles for your reference. I am available for a video interview on weekdays. I would appreciate your reply at your earliest convenience. ( 正文)
Yours sincerely,(结束语) Li Hua(签名)
Encl. : a CV and a duplicate of my article( 附件)
英语书信的正文是书信的主体。正文的结构层次是:引言、中心部分和结尾。引言一般写收到了信、好久没联系、听到了什么消息以及其他表示问候的话等。中心部分是正文最重要的组成部分。结尾是表示希望、祝愿等的客套话。
常用引言 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am very glad to hear (about) your good news. 听说了你的好消息我很高兴。 $\textcircled{2}$ Forgive me for not writing to you earlier. 原谅我没有早点给你写信。 $\textcircled{3}$ I have not heard from you for over a month. 我已经有一个多月没收到你的来信了。 $\circledast$ It is really kind of you to reply so quickly. 你能这么快回信真是太好了。 $\textcircled{5}$ It' s really great to get a letter from you at last. 终于收到了你的来信，真是太好了。 $\circled{6}$ Thank you so much for your congratulations. 非常感谢你的祝贺。 $\textcircled{7}$ I am very sorry to hear that you have not been well. 听说你身体不好我很难过。 $\textcircled{8}$ What a nice surprise to hear from you at last! 终于收到了你的来信，真让人惊喜！ $\textcircled{9}$ It is very nice to hear from you. 很高兴收到你的信。 $\textcircled{10}$ Please forgive me for not answering your leter in time. 请原谅我没有及时给你回信。
常用结尾 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I shall be looking forward to hearing from you soon. 盼望很快收到您的信。 $\textcircled{2}$ I hope you will soon settle into your new job/school. 愿你会很快在新单位/学校安顿下来。 $\textcircled{3}$ I am very sorry for all the trouble that it has caused you. 对于由此给您带来的所有麻烦我深表歉意。 $\circledast$ I am very sorry for any inconvenience I have caused you. 对于我给您带来的任何不便我深表歉意。 $\textcircled{5}$ I wish you good luck (with the exam)/every success (in the exam). 祝你(考试)顺利/ (考试)成功。 $\textcircled{6}$ Please give my regards to your parents. 请代我向你父母问好。 $\textcircled{7}$ I hope you will be well again soon. 愿你早日康复。 $\circled{8}$ Please kindly remember me to your family. 请代我向你的家人问好。 $\circledcirc$ Thank you again for your kindness and consideration. 再次感谢您的好心和体谅。 $\textcircled{10}$ We would greatly appreciate your cooperation. 我们会非常感谢您的协助。
四、英语常用书信的写作模板、写作范文及高分句式
(一)感谢信 1.写作模板 Dear 信件启首 I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for (感 谢的原因).
解释感谢的原因 具体描述对方的帮助以及这种帮助的意义 Everyone agrees that it was you who (给出细节).Ifit had not been for your assistance in (对方给予的具体帮 助),I'm afraid that I would have been (没有对方帮助的 后果).
Again, I would like to express my heartfelt thanks to you! Please accept my gratitude.
再次表达感谢 Yours sincerely, 信件结尾与签名 (签名)
2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Gratitude. You should base your composition on the outlinegiven below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，上周在英国参加了学校组织的“文化交流周”活动，并住在Kelly 家。请你写一封感谢信，内容应包括：
(1)表达感谢; (2)活动中的收获; (3)感谢她送你的英文小说。[范文]
Dear Kelly , I' ve been back home safely from England. I' d like to express my sincere gratitude for your warm help during my stay in England.
Last week, I participated in the Cultural Exchange Week. I enjoyed myself in your country. We paid a visit to the British Museum and many places of interest, which made me have a better understanding of the English society, culture and history. Besides, I also made many new friends. What' s more, 1 was lucky enough to stay at your home.
I'll never forget the days we spent together. Here I especially want to thank you for the English novel you offered me as a gift, which is helpful for me to understand English well. I will treasure and read it carefully.
Sincerely yours, Li Hua
3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ Thank you so much for... 非常感谢你..·. $\textcircled{2}$ I sincerely appreciate your kind hospitality/help. 我诚挚地感谢你的友好款待/帮助。 $\textcircled{3}$ My deep gratitude is beyond words/ description. 我深深的谢意无以言表。 $\circledast$ We are very thankful/ grateful for your help. 我们非常感谢你们的帮助。 $\textcircled{5}$ I'd like to take this opportunity to express my great appreciation for your timely assistance and support. 我谨借此机会对您的及时帮助和支持深表感谢。 $\textcircled{6}$ I am specially writing to thank you, on behalf of my family, for the lovely time we had at your party last night. 昨天晚上我们在你们的聚会上玩得很愉快，我特写此信代表我的家人向你们表示感谢。 $\textcircled{7}$ I would like to convey in this letter my heartfelt thanks to you for.. 在此信中我想表达对您.·由衷的感谢。 $\circled{8}$ I must thank you again for your generous help. 对于您的慷慨帮助.我必须再次表示感谢。
(二)邀请信 1.写作模板 Dear I'm (表明身份).We’d/I'd like to invite you to (写信目的).
信件启首表明身份并点明写信目的 There will be a( n) (活动名称)at/in (地点)on (时间). The occasion will start at (具体时间). This will be followed by (进一步的安排).Ataround (时间), (另一项安排).
具体说明活动的地点、时间和内容 I' m sure you' ll have a good time. Will you be available during this time? Please contact me at $\times\times\times\times\times$ at your earliest convenience.
询问对方是否有空并请求对方给予回复 Looking forward to your coming/participation.
表达自己的期待 Yours , (签名) 信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Invitation. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，你们班将于本周日去太阳岛度假村(the Sun Island Resort)游玩，你们的外教 Tim 之前也
一直想去。请你写一封邀请信，内容应包括： (1)告知出发及返回时间; (2)介绍活动安排:骑自行车、钓鱼、划船、烧烤等； (3)期待对方接受邀请。
[范文] Dear Tim, I'm Li Hua. Our class is planning to go on an outing to the Sun Island Resort this Sunday. 1 remember that you have been eager to go there, so I am writing on behalf of our classmates to invite you to join us.
Since autumn is coming with cool weather and maple leaves turning red, we all think it a good opportunity for us to get close to nature and relax ourselves. We are scheduled to gather at the school gate at 9:00 a.m. , and take a bus to the Sun Island Resort, which will take about half an hour. The activities will definitely appeal to us. We will have lots of fun riding bicycles, fishing, going boating on the lake and even barbecuing. About 3 hours later, we will go back to school.
We sincerely hope you can come and have a good time with us.
Sincerely yours, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am writing to invite you to... 我写信是想邀请您..··. $\textcircled{2}$ I wonder/am wondering if/whether you could come to... 我想知道您是否能来······ $\textcircled{3}$ It would be very great if you could participate in... 如果您能参加.·..那就太好了。 $\circledast$ It is with the greatest pleasure that I write to invite you to attend the meeting. 我非常荣幸地写信邀请您参加这次会议。 $\circled{5}$ Since you are eager to..., it will be a great chance. 既然你渴望.···.，这将是个很好的机会。 $\textcircled{6}$ My family and I would feel honored if you could come. 如果您能来，我和我的家人将感到不胜荣幸。 $\textcircled{7}$ We would be looking forward to your attending the party. 我们期待您参加这次聚会。 $\circled{8}$ I sincerely hope you can accept the invitation. 我真诚地希望您能接受邀请。 $\textcircled{9}$ I hope that you won’t decline/refuse my invitation.我希望您不会拒绝我的邀请。 $\textcircled{10}$ Would you please let me know as soon as possible if/whether you can accept my invitation? 能否尽早让我知道您是否会接受我的邀请？
(三)建议信 1.写作模板 Dear 信件启首 简单阐述写信原因、建议内容和提出建议的理由
I am very pleased to know that (写信原因). In my opinion/As far as I' m concerned, (建议内 容).On the one hand, (理由一).On the other hand , (理由二).
As to I suggest (建议一). If,you will (解释原因).It is necessary for you to (建议二).In addition, (建议 三). I am sure (对所提建议的效果表示肯定).
提出具体的建议并解释原因 Please inform me if there is anything I can do for you. I am looking forward to (愿望).
表达自己的心情和愿望 Sincerely yours , (签名)
信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Suggestion. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，一家新开业的外文书店为增加访客量而向顾客征求建议。请你写一封建议信，内容应包括：
(1)书店应拥有宽的空间，以提供良好的阅读体验； (2)书店应提供咨询、讲座等服务和咖啡快餐区。
[范文] Dear Sir or Madam, I am Li Hua. Congratulations on your newly opened foreign language bookstore. I love visiting bookstores, and here are some suggestions for increasing the popularity of your bookstore.
Firstly, spacious room should be designed to provide readers with a good reading experience, which online bookstores can't match. Secondly, it may be helpful to offer some consultation or relevant reading lectures to help readers make proper choices of books or stimulate their interest in reading. In addition, a coffee and snack section will also make the bookstore more attractive.
Hope my ideas will be helpful!
3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I would like to suggest that../I am writing with my sugestions/proposals/recommendations for../I a writing to express my views concerning... 我想建议.……·/我写信是想就.…·.一事提出我的建议。／我写信是为了表达我对·..··的看法。 $\textcircled{2}$ You have asked me for my advice with regard to...and I will try to make some constructive sugestions. 关于....·你征求了我的意见，我会尽量提一些建设性的建议。 $\textcircled{3}$ I feel that it would be very beneficial if... 我觉得如果..·将会很有用。 $\circledast$ If I were you, I would... 如果我是你，我会····. $\textcircled{5}$ I've ben thinking about the question you mentioned in the letter. In my opinion, you should... 我一直在思考你在来信中提到的问题。在我看来，你应该·.·. $\textcircled{6}$ When it comes to such a situation, I would like to sugest that.. 当涉及这种情况时，我想建议.·· $\textcircled{7}$ I hope you will find these sugestions/proposals/recommendations helpful/ practical/useful. 我希望你会觉得这些建议是有帮助的/切实可行的/有用的。 $\textcircled{8}$ I believe you will take my suggestions into account/consideration. 我相信你会考虑我的建议的。 $\circledcirc$ I would be very happy to see improvements in this regard. 我会很高兴看到这方面得到改善。 $\textcircled{10}$ I would be ready to discuss further details of this matter with you. 我将做好与你进一步详谈此事的准备。
(四)投诉信 1.写作模板 To Whom It May Concern,
source: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output

id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0037
text:
信件启首 表明身份并陈述投诉内容 I am (表明身份).HereIamwriting to express my dissatisfaction with (具体事件). The reasons are as follows. In the first place , (问 题一).In addition, (问题二).Under these circumstances, I find it (问题所带来的后果). I hope you could (提出请求),andIwould like to have this matter settled by (设定解决事件的 最后期限).Thank you for your consideration and I will be looking forward to your reply.
说明存在的具体问题及后果提出解决方案信件结尾与签名
2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Complaint. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，你从网上买了一部新手机，但刚用一天，就发现屏幕显示不清楚，并且由于电池原因，手机待机时间短。请你写一封投诉信，内容应包括：
(1)说明购物情况;(2)反映存在的问题;(3)提出解决方案。[范文]
To Whom It May Concern,
I am Li Hua. Here I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the new cellphone I bought from your online store on August 12.
The reasons are as follows. In the first place, the screen display of my new cellphone isn't clear. This issue seriously affects my use. In addition, I think there is something wrong with the battery, because I have to recharge my cellphone at least five times a day. Under these circumstances, I find it hard to put up with those problems and I strongly suspect the quality of your products.
I hope you could exchange a new one and pay the return postage. What' s more, I would like to have this matter settled by next Sunday. Thank you for your consideration and I will be looking forward to your reply.
Yours, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am writing to complain about/of... 我写此信是为了投诉有关.····的情况。 $\textcircled{2}$ I think it' s high time you realized/should realize... 我认为该是您认识到·.··的时候了。 $\textcircled{3}$ To be frank, I am not prepared to put up with the situation any more. 坦率地说，我不准备再忍受这种状况了。 $\ensuremath{\mathcal{Q}}$ I' m sorry to be so forthright, but I wish to express my dissatisfaction at/with... 很抱歉我这么直截了当，但是我想表达对·..…·的不满。 $\textcircled{5}$ I would really appreciate it if you could and would do something about my complaint. 如果您能够并且愿意针对我的投诉做些什么的话，我将十分感激。 $\circled{6}$ To remedy the matter, I suggest making the following changes. 为了解决这个问题，我建议做出如下改变。 $\textcircled{7}$ I hope I can get my refund as soon as possible. 我希望能尽快收到退款。 $\circled{8}$ I hope you can make an investigation into this matter as soon as posible. 我希望你们能尽快调查此事。 $\textcircled{9}$ I have been very pleased with your service for years, but now I feel very disappointed. 多年来我一直很满意你们的服务，但现在我感到非常失望。 $\textcircled{10}$ I hope you can attach great importance to this matter. 希望您能高度重视此事。
(五)申请信(求职信) 1.写作模板 Dear I'm from (表明身份).I’mwriting to(写信目的),forIbelieve that (申请原因).
I think I am qualified for (申请职位)because (优 势一). Moreover,I also have (优势二).That's why I apply for the position. /I do hope I can join in the activity.
信件启首 表明身份，说明写信目的和申请原因 介绍个人情况和优势，说明能够胜任的原因 Once admitted, I plan to (计划一), (计划二)and (计划三).What’s more important is (达到的效果).
阐述对该职位的设想 I hope you can offer me the opportunity and thank you very much.
Yours faithfully , (签名) 表达自己的期待 信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Application. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，得知某英文报社正在招聘兼职记者，你有意应聘该职位。请你写一封申请信，内容应包括：
(1)表明对该职位感兴趣； (2)陈述你的优势; (3)希望得到回复。
[范文] Dear Sir or Madam, I' m Li Hua. I have read your advertisement for recruiting part-time English reporters and I am writing to apply for the position of your newspaper.
I think I'm fit for the job. First of all, I major in English and do well in both speaking and writing. Besides, I love reading and have much knowledge in many fields. What' s more, I can get along well with others and enjoy working with them. Above all, I once worked as a reporter for my school
broadcasting station. So I' m sure that I will be a qualified applicant.
I will be very pleased to have an interview when it is convenient for you. Looking forward to your earlyreply.
Yours faithfully, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am writing to apply for the post of...advertised/posted in/on.. 兹申请刊登/发布在.····上的.···.职位。 $\textcircled{2}$ Seeing your advertisement in/on..., I beg to apply for the post of...in your company. 看到贵公司在.···上的广告，我谨申请贵公司的….职位。 $\textcircled{3}$ I' m writing this leter to recommend myself as a qualified candidate for... 作为.…·的合格人选，我写此信推荐自己。 $\textcircled{4}$ The kind of business in which your company is now engaged particularly interests me. 我对贵公司目前从事的这种业务特别感兴趣。 $\textcircled{5}$ I feel I have the necessary qualifications and experience needed for the position of... 我认为我具备..一职所需要的必备条件和经验。 $\textcircled{6}$ I shall bring with me my testimonials at your request.我将应您的要求带上我的证明书。 $\textcircled{7}$ I hope I may be given a chance to have an interview in which I can explain my qualifications for this job more fully. 我希望能得到面试机会，届时我可以更充分地说明自己担任该项工作的资格。 $\circled{8}$ I will be very pleased to have an interview when it is convenient for you, and then I will give you further details concerning myself. 我会很乐意在您方便时接受面试，届时我会进一步向您介绍自己的详细情况。 $\textcircled{9}$ It seems to me that this experience, together with my educational background, has given me qualfications to assume the role of...in a firm like yours. 在我看来，这种经验加上我的教育背景，使我具备了担任像贵公司这样的公司中.....一职的资格。 $\textcircled{10}$ I shall be much obliged if you give me a precious chance to have an interview. 如果您能给我一个宝贵的面试机会，我将不胜感激。
(六)推荐信 1.写作模板 To Whom It May Concern,
信件启首 It affords me much pleasure to recommend (被推荐 人) to you.During his/her in he/she was my (关系).As his/her I found him/her (看法).
引出被推荐人，介绍自己和被推荐人的关系及自己对被推荐人的看法
His/Her performance in the (某方面)was outstanding. First, he/she was and showed a great talent
介绍被推荐人的优势 for (优势一).In addition,he/she has (优势 二). Furthermore, he/she has developed , and working with him/her is always (优势三).I can state that he/ she has all the qualities of being
希望对方接受被推荐人 Therefore, I recommend (进行推荐).Your favorable consideration of his/her application will be most appreciated. I am sure that (表明对被推荐人的信心). If further information about his/her qualifications is needed , please feel free to contact me.
信件结尾与签名及推荐人的职务 Sincerely yours ,(签名)(职务)
2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Recommendation. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，是一所大学的英语教授，你的学生陈丽要应聘一家图书公司的英语编辑职位。请你写一封推荐信，内容应包括：
(1)介绍自己与陈丽的关系； (2)介绍她在学校时的优秀表现并极力推荐她。
To Whom It May Concern,
As Chen Li' s professor, I have taught her for four years, and I would like to recommend her to you as an English editor.
In my eyes, Chen Li is a friendly and outgoing girl. She often takes an active part in various school activities to enrich her life. Besides, as the secretary of the Student Union, she has gained rich experience of dealing with different people and situations. More importantly, in terms of academic performance, she is an excellent student, who is especially good at English.
With rich social practice experience as well as a high level of competence in English, I believe Chen Li is able to work as an English editor in your company. Therefore, I strongly recommend her to you as I think she is the right person for this position.
Sincerely yours, Li Hua
Professor of English 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I would like to recommend...for your consideration in your search for a marketing manager. 对您正在招聘的市场经理一职，我想推荐.供您考虑。
$\textcircled{2}$ According to your requirements , I will, without reservation, recommend...as an ideal candidate.依照你们的要求，我愿意毫无保留地推荐...…作为最合适的人选。
$\textcircled{3}$ Therefore , I don't hesitate for a moment about recommending...as the right person for your consideration. 因此，我毫不犹豫地推荐.....作为合适人选供您考虑。
$\textcircled{4}$ I am very pleased to recommend..., one of my favorite students, to you for admission to... 我很高兴能向您推荐我最喜欢的学生之一·….··进人·.
$\textcircled{5}$ His/Her contribution to all kinds of company activities in which he/she has been involved has been much appreciated by all.
所有人都非常欣赏他/她在参与过的各项公司活动中做出的贡献。
$\textcircled{6}$ Any favorable consideration of this letter would be considered a personal favor.
任何对此信的积极考虑都将被视为私人恩情。 $\textcircled{7}$ I' m sure the person I recommend to you will meet what you need. 我确信我为您推荐的人会满足您的需要。
$\circled{8}$ I sincerely hope you will give him/her favorable consideration.
我真诚地希望您能优先考虑他/她。 (七)祝贺信 1.写作模板 Dear 信件启首 I am delighted to learn that (某消息).This happy event in your life prompts me to reply at once and, in my own peculiar way, to express my hearty congratulations and good wishes. It is really good news to And I feel very happy for you.
引出值得祝贺的消息并表示自己的祝贺 You are really (评价一).You must be/have been very (评价二).Iknow this is It is you richly deserve.
对被祝贺人进行评价 With your , I am sure that you will (对 被祝贺人的信心).Ihope (愿望).Again,please accept my sincere congratulations.
表达对被祝贺人的信心和自己的愿望，并再次表示祝贺
Best wishes to you! 表达诚挚的祝福 Sincerely yours , (签名)
信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part, you are required to write A Letter of Congratulation. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，你得知朋友Jack被哈佛大学录取了。请你写一封祝贺信，内容应包括：
(1)表达自己的祝贺； (2)对被祝贺人和学校进行评价； (3)表达诚挚的祝福。
[范文] Dear Jack, It is delightful for me to know that you are admitted into Harvard University. I am writing to offer my sincerest congratulations on your admission to it. As your close friend, I am very proud of you and 1 believe it is good news to you and your family.
In my view, this admission is a reward that you richly deserve because you are highly intelligent and always diligent with abundant knowledge in many fields. Besides, Harvard University is the dream university for countless students, where you can learn from the top professors and are accompanied by the most excellent peers.
I wish you greater achievements in the future and I am looking forward to hearing more good news from you.

text:
Sincerely yours, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ It is the most joyful news I have heard for such a long time. 这是这么长时间以来我听到的最令人愉快的消息。 $\textcircled{2}$ I wish you all possible joy and happiness in the world. 愿你得到世上一切可能的快乐和幸福。 $\textcircled{3}$ I was pleasantly surprised to know that you... 知道你.····，我喜出望外。 $\circledast$ We hope you will have nothing but joy and happiness both in your life and in your chosen career. 我们希望你的生活和你选择的事业中都只有快乐和幸福。 $\circled{5}$ Congratulations on your promotion/graduation/success/progress/achievements. 恭喜你升职/毕业/成功/进步/取得成就。 $\textcircled{6}$ Wish you the best of luck and happiness. 愿你得到最美好的幸运和幸福。 $\textcircled{7}$ Please accept my sincere congratulations on.. 请接受我对···的诚挚祝贺。 $\circled{8}$ Here are my best wishes to you the birthday girl from a good friend! 好朋友在这里向你这位女寿星致以最美好的祝愿！
(八)道信 1.写作模板 Dear 信件启首 I am very sorry that (道原因)./It is a pity that (道漱原因).I am writing this letter to show my deep regret.
陈述道歉原因，表达诚挚的歉意 252 I will be very grateful if you are kind to listen to my detailed explanation. The reason for is/was that (事件 的起因).Therefore, (事件的结果).I do hope you can understand me and (请求谅解).
Would you please understand my situation and accept my apology? I would appreciate your allowing me to (补救措 施). Once again, I' m sorry for any inconvenience I have caused.
解释具体事由，并希望获得谅解提出补救措施并再次致歉
Yours , (签名) 信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part , you are required to write A Letter of Apology. You should base your composition on the outline given below in Chinese.
假设你是李华，因病未能完成外教Smith 先生上周布置的读书报告。请你写一封道歉信，内容应包括：
(1)表示歉意； (2)解释原因; (3)请求延期。
[范文] Dear Mr. Smith, I' m terribly sorry for not having finished the book report that you assigned to us last week. Now I' m writing to express my sincere apology and give an explanation.
The reason why I didn't finish the book report on time is that I suddenly fell ill last Friday morning. My parents sent me to hospital and I had to stay there for the next three days. Therefore, there was not enough time for me to finish the book report.
I sincerely hope that you can consider my situation and accept my apology. I would be grateful if you could give me another two days to finish the book report.
Yours, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am writing this letter to apologize to you for/to say sorry for.. 我写这封信是就...·.一事向你道歉。 $\textcircled{2}$ I would like to express my deepest apology for not being able to/failing to... 我想为不能·····表达我最深切的歉意。 $\textcircled{3}$ It is very kind of you to invite us to...But, to our regret, we cannot accept it 谢谢你邀请我们去·····但遗憾的是，我们不能接受。 $\circledast$ I am sorry I cannot...and I hope that you will be able to understand. 抱歉我不能.···…并且我希望你能理解。 $\textcircled{5}$ I will try to make up for my fault. 我将尽力弥补我的过错。 $\circled{6}$ Would you mind if I change the appointment time? 你介意我改一下约会时间吗？ $\textcircled{7}$ I want you to know how bad I feel about this and I assure you that such a thing will not happen again. 我想让你知道我对此感到多么难过，并且我向你保证这种事不会再发生了。 $\textcircled{8}$ I hope that this does not cause you too much inconvenience. 我希望这不会给你造成太多不便。 $\textcircled{9}$ I sincerely hope that you will be able to think about my position and accept my apology. 我真诚地希望你可以考虑我的处境并接受我的道歉。 $\textcircled{10}$ Once again, I am sorry for any inconvenience I have caused. 我再次对我所造成的任何不便表示歉意。
(九)求助信 1.写作模板 Dear I am (表明身份).Here I'm writing to ask you for help.
信件启首表明身份并说明写信目的 I have had much difficulty/trouble in (困难一). Besides, I' m very upset that (困难二).What’s more, I don't know (困难三).I'm wondering if you could be so kind to (请求对方的帮助).
说明自己遇到的困难并请求对方的帮助 I'd appreciate it if you could lend me a hand. I' m looking forward to your early reply.
期待对方的回复信件结尾与签名 2.写作范文 例如 Directions: For this part , you are required to write A Letter for Help. You should base your composition on the outlinegivenbelow inChinese.
假设你是李华，在英语学习过程中遇到一些困难，希望得到外教 Phil 先生的帮助。请你写一封求助信，内容应包括：
(1)寻求帮助; (2)求助内容; (3)约定时间。
[范文] Dear Mr. Phil, I am Li Hua, a student in your class. You always impress us with your passion and instructive teaching. However, I find it hard to improve my English and am overwhelmed by a sense of powerlessness, so I am now writing to seek your help.
To begin with, despite many years’ English learning, I stillfind myself trapped in the situation where I can't naturally and fluently express what I have in my mind in English. The Chinese way of expressions always stands in my way. Secondly, it takes me a lot of time to memorize English words. But unfortunately, the following day I often forget what I recited. These all make me very anxious and exhausted.
I am wondering whether you are available at 3:00 p. m. this Friday. If possible, a face-to-face chat with you is expected. Sorry to bother you with my problems. Looking forward to your reply at your earliestconvenience.
Yours sincerely, Li Hua 3.高分句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I am writing this letter to ask you to do me a favor. 我写这封信是想请你帮个忙。 $\textcircled{2}$ I sincerely hope that you can give me some advice/suggestions on.. 我真诚地希望你能给我一些有关.···的建议。 $\textcircled{3}$ I would appreciate it if you could give me some help. 如果你能给我一些帮助，我将不胜感激。 $\ensuremath{\mathcal{Q}}$ I have some dificulty (in) doing..., which bothers me a lot. So I have no choice but to turn to you for help. 我在做·..··方面有些困难，这使我很困扰。因此我别无选择，只能向你求助。 $\textcircled{5}$ There are many problems that I' m faced with now. Firstly...Secondl... 目前我面临很多问题。第一·..….第二·…··. $\textcircled{6}$ If you were faced with these problems, what would you do? Any advice wil be a great help. 如果你面对这些问题，你会怎么做？任何建议都会有很大的帮助。 $\textcircled{7}$ I' m sure/convinced that with your help I can... 我确信有你的帮助我就能····. $\circled{8}$ I am looking forward to receiving your letter of suggestion and thank you in advance. 我期待着收到您的建议信，并提前表示感谢。
第三节 非信函类应用文写作 非信函类应用文主要包括通知、电子邮件、备忘录(便函)、便条、海报、发言稿、启事、广告、简历等。
一、通知 通知(Notice)是一种使用范围很广的应用文体。通知的正文包括被通知的对象、事由、时间、地点等。写通知时应注意以下要点：
(1)标题，即Notice，常大写为NOTICE。
(2)标题的前面有时需写上发通知的单位名称，单位名称也常常写在通知末尾右下角的地方，成为落款。落款也可包括日期。
(3)通知的语言应简洁明了，不能含糊不清。
例如 NOTICE With the purpose of promoting students’ writing skills, a fiction writing contest will be held by the school next week.
Those who intend to participate are required to finish an original short novel in English with no more than 500 words, reflecting the real life of students. Besides, what you are required to keep in mind is that the deadline of this activity is May 30, after which all the novels will be carefully and fairly judged by Our foreign teachers.
If you are fortunate enough to win this contest, you will be awarded a certificate as an encouragement for your accomplishment. We are looking forward to your participation.
The Student Union 常用句式 $\textcircled{\scriptsize{1}}$ I'm very happy to inform you that.. 很高兴通知你们···. $\textcircled{2}$ People who would like to go please register at../If interested , please sign up at... 想去的人请到·……处登记。/如果感兴趣，请到·….…·处报名。 $\textcircled{3}$ All the members of the association are requested to attend the meeting. 要求社团里所有的成员都参加会议。 $\circledast$ No asking for leave without special reasons. 没有特殊原因不准请假。 $\textcircled{5}$ All those who are interested are warmly welcome. 热烈欢迎所有感兴趣者。 $\textcircled{6}$ Anyone who is enthusiastic and willing to spend their time participating in this activity is welcomed. 欢迎任何有热情、愿意花时间参与该活动的人。 $\textcircled{7}$ Please inform the others concerned. 请通知其余相关人员。 $\textcircled{8}$ If you need any further information, please don't hesitate to contact... 如需任何进一步的信息，请尽管联系····. $\textcircled{9}$ We are looking forward to your participation. 我们期待您的参与。
$\textcircled{10}$ This is to notify you that from today to next Sunday, the elevator will be suspended owing to repair. 通知：即日起至下周日，电梯因维修将暂停使用。
二、电子邮件 电子邮件(Email/E-mail)是进行信息交换的一种通信方式。在考试中，电子邮件的格式比较简单，按照书信的格式书写即可。写作时要注意语言简洁，行文自然流畅。
例如Dear Chris, I' m Li Hua, the captain of our school baseball team. I am writing to inform you that our team is going to play in the National League soon. Every participating team is great. It can be predicted that this is a close match.
Our team is now busy preparing for the game. We are confident that we can win this match. But we sincerely hope you will give us your guidance and encouragement, which will surely be very helpful to us.
I am looking forward to hearing from you.
Yours sincerely, Li Hua 三、备忘录(便函) 备忘录(便函)可用Memo 表示，通常用于在公司内部传递信息。其内容涉及很多方面，主要是通知对方在当天或近期内需要办理的事情。备忘录(便函)一般使用常用词、短句和简短的段落，简明扼要，清楚准确，方便阅读。备忘录(便函)一般应包括以下几部分：
(1)书端(即开头的信息)。 To:(收件人) From:(发件人) Date:(日期) Subject:(主题/事由) 有时由于情况不同，书端的格式也会有所不同。(2)正文。 (3)结束语。 (4)署名。
备忘录(便函)的书端和正文是必须要有的部分，而结束语和署名则可以视情况添加，有时也可以省略。
Memo To: Mr. Owen, HR Department From: Mr. Edward, Planning Department Date: March 9 Subject: A sales manager wanted
I would like to inform you that our company intends to expand its business in China and thereby it is in urgent need of a capable sales manager. The requirements for the applicant are as follows.
First of all, he or she should be experienced in marketing planning, with at least two years′ work experience. Secondly, he or she should be fluent in Mandarin and English concerning listening, speaking and writing. Thirdly, he or she must have a good command of computers. Finally, he or she should be gifted with good interpersonal, report-writing and presentation skills.
I do hope you can find a suitable person for our department.
四、便条 便条(Note)是简单的信函，多为临时性的通知、请求、询问或留言，因此往往比较简短，格式也比一般信函简单。
写便条时应注意以下要点： (1)便条所谈内容多是最近一两天的事情，所以便条中往往只需写上一个日期;有时也可以不写日期，只写星期几;有时也可以只写上午、下午或晚上;有时只写上时刻即可。
(2)便条多用于熟人、朋友或同事之间，因此便条通常不用写地址。
(3)结束语除了可以用Yours sincerely 等外，还可以用Your friend,Your student,Yours 等，也可以省略。
(4) 便条的语言应简单明了且通俗易懂。 常用的便条有请假条(事假、病假等)、留言条等。本部分主要对请假条和留言条进行讲解：
(一)请假条 请假条常采用书信格式，比较正式，需写明日期、称呼、姓名等。请假条的正文中一定要写明理由。必要时应附上相关证明。
例如 January 20 Dear Mr. Wilson, I' m Li Hua, deeply sorry for not being able to attend the lecture on British history and culture next Monday afternoon. I' m writing to ask for leave.
source: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output

id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0039
text:
I will participate in my final-round interview for an exchange program on the same day, for which 1 have prepared for a long time. Personally, I' m desperate to be chosen as an exchange student. There is no doubt that British history and culture interests me most, and I will try hard to make up for the missing parts. Would it be possible for me to have my classmate record the lecture? If possible, I could take notes while listening.
I' m hoping to have your permission.
Yours, Li Hua (二)留言条 留言条常用于熟人之间，一般都是托人转交或本人在某一场合直接留言。留言条所说明的内容一般都是近期的情况，所以其语言大都比较简明扼要，而且格式也不如书信那样严格。
例如 5:00 p.m. Peter, I came to see you but you were out. I' d like to invite you to see Peking Opera with me next week, since you have always wanted to know more about Chinese culture.
With a history of over 200 years, Peking Opera is considered as an indispensable part of Chinese culture. The performers in beautiful costume perform various stories that happened in history for the audience by singing, dance and motions.
I can tell you more about it when we meet.
Please let me know when you will be free and I will buy the tickets in advance. I sincerely hope that you can accept my invitation and I' m sure you'll enjoy it.
Li Hua 五、海报 海报(Poster)是日常生活中极为常见的一种招贴形式，多用于电影、比赛、文艺演出等活动。海报的写法常不拘泥于固定的格式，但是通常情况下由三部分组成，即标题、正文与落款。海报的标题对于海报的宣传极为重要，因此标题的撰写要尽量做到简洁明快、新颖醒目，以吸引读者的注意力。海报的标题形式通常有两种：一种是直接使用Poster一词;另一种则是根据海报的内容撰写标题，题目居中。
海报的正文是海报的核心部分，它是对海报标题的具体描述。正文应写清楚活动的举办时间、地点、参加方式及主办单位等信息。海报的号召性很强，希望他人参与，没有约束性，所以用语既要实事求是，又要有鼓动性。
例如- Come and Attend the Lecture
Do you want to improve your English and learn English happily? Come and join us! A lecture on " Learning English Happily" is to be held on the first floor of our school auditorium from 4:30 to 5:30 next Mondayafternoon.
The lecturer, Li Lin, will share his learning experience with us. In addition, he will introduce some methods of learning English. After the lecture, you can ask him for advice on any problem you have while learning English. I' m sure you will benefit a lot from the lecture.
The Student Union April 5 六、发言稿 发言稿(Speech)是人们为了在会议或重要活动上发表自已的意见、看法或汇报思想及工作情况等而事先准备好的文稿。常见的发言稿有致辞、演讲等，通常由三部分组成，即称呼语、正文与结束语。在内容上，应根据活动的具体要求而定，力求中心明确，言之有物；在表达上，偏重议论、说明，也不排斥必要的记叙、抒情，力求条理清晰，简明扼要。发言稿的特点是具有针对性、启发性和感染力。
例如 Good evening, This evening, we gather here to have a farewell party. Our English teacher Mr. Smith is going to return to his country for the winter holiday. I am on behalf of the class to express our sincere gratitude for what Mr. Smith has done to help us.
He is almost a perfect teacher in our eyes. His sense of humor and teaching style can always make English classes so fascinating that we all actively get involved in them. With his guidance, all of us have made great progress in our spoken English.
Moreover, he is always ready to help. Whenever we' re in trouble, he is always the first man for us to depend on.
Thank Mr. Smith again and wish him a safe journey home and a happy life in the future.
That's all. Thank you!
七、启事 启事(Announcement)是向公众说明某事或希望公众协办某事的一种短文，具有公开性、广泛性、实用性、随意性的特点。主要包括招募启事、征稿启事、招领启事、寻物启事等。启事一般由以下三部分组成：
(1)标题。写明启事的名称，这主要由启事的内容决定，如内容是征文，则标题为Contributions Wanted。 (2)正文。根据题干要求，向公众说明情况。 (3)落款。写明启事者和启事日期。
Contributions Wanted Teachers’ Day falls on September 10 annually. To promote the traditional virtue of respecting teachers and valuing education, we' re to launch a new column—My Favorite Teacher.
Everyone is welcome to write essays on your favorite teacher, including a brief introduction and an unforgettable memory.
Besides, your contribution is expected to be within 200 words. Please send your contribution to Room 401 in the Art Building or email it to Englishcolumn $@$ 163. com before September 5.
We expect to read stories between you and your teachers.
The School Newspaper August 25 八、广告 广告(Advertisement)是向社会公众告知某件事物的文体。广告有经济广告和非经济广告之分。经济广告是指以营利为目的的广告，通常是商业广告，它是为了推销商品或服务，通过广告媒体向消费者或用户传播商品或服务信息的手段；非经济广告是指不以营利为目的的广告，如政府公告。广告不仅对广告主有利，而且对目标对象也有好处，它使消费者或用户能够得到有用的信息。广告语言的最大特点是具有鼓动性和吸引力，人称以第三人称为主，时态以一般现在时为主。广告一般由以下三部分组成：
(1)标题。可以直接用 Advertisement，也可以根据广告内容自拟题目，但注意标题要简洁明了。
(2)正文。根据题干要求，对广告内容进行具体阐述。
(3)随文。又叫附文，是传达企业名称、地址、购买方式等附加广告信息的文字，一般出现在尾段。
Welcome to Xu Fu's Dumpling House
We have many kinds of dumplings at Xu Fu's Dumpling House. Here, dumplings are both big and delicious. Now we have two great specials. Special 1 is carrot dumplings and is just 8 yuan for 20. Special 2 is beef dumplings with onions and is just 10 yuan for 20.
Welcome to our dumpling house. Our address is 10 Bingfield Stret. You may call us at 12345678910. Thank you for coming.
九、简历 简历(Resume)通常由以下几部分组成。前四个部分为基本项目，不可缺少，其余几个部分可视申请人的经历、所申请工作的性质、招聘方的要求而定。
(1)个人信息(Personal Information)。 (2)求职目标(Job/Career Objective)。 (3)教育背景(EducationalBackground)。 (4)工作经历(Work Experience)。 (5)所获荣誉(Honors/Awards)。 (6)出版著作(Publications)。 (7)外语技能(Foreign Language Skills)。 (8)兴趣爱好(Interests and Hobbies)。 (9)个人品质(Personal Qualities)。 (10)所获证书(Certificates)。
例如 Resume Personal Information :
Name: Li Hua Date of Birth: Sept. 10,1991 Place of Birth: Beijing Gender: Female Marital Status: Married Nationality: Chinese Current Address: Building No. 12, Qingnian Road, Chaoyang District, Beijing Telephone: xxxxxx Mobile Phone: xxxxxx Email: Lihua $@$ hotmail. com
Career Objective : English teacher Educational Background :
2014. 9-2017.6 School of Foreign Languages and Literature, Beijing Normal University, MA 2010. 9-2014.6 School of Foreign Languages, Peking University, BA
Work Experience : 2017.9-present Teacher, University of International Relations
Honors : Award for Excellent Teachers of Beijing 2020
Publications : “Education for Adults in the US" No. 4 2016. Foreign Language Teaching and Research "How to Improve Your English Reading Ability” No. 2 2014. Foreign Language Teaching and Research
Foreign Language Skills :
Excellent English and French
Hobbies : Swimming and reading Personal Qualities : Honest, dependable, responsible, having an independent mind and great team spirit
第四节 试题举例及精讲 你是张伟。暑假将至，正是旅游的好时节。请给你的英国外教Peter写一封邀请信，邀请他暑假参观你的家乡，内容包括以下要点：
(1)自我介绍并表明写信目的； (2)简要介绍你的家乡及旅行安排； (3)期待对方接受邀请。
【写作思路】这是一篇信函类应用文，要求考生写一封邀请信。根据所给提示信息，考生可采用如下行文思路：第一段，表明自我身份和写信目的；第二段，简要介绍你的家乡及旅行安排；最后一段，表示自己期待对方接受邀请。
[范文] Dear Peter, My name is Zhang Wei, one of your students. I am greatly honored to invite you to my hometown, Huangshan City, during the summervacation.
My city is famous for Mount Huangshan, which is listed as a world cultural and natural heritage. We can climb the mountain and eat the local food. If you consider accepting my invitation, here is the travel plan. We can meet at our school gate and then go to the mountain together. You will enjoy the rural scene and breathe the fresh air. Additionally, you can appreciate the amazing view of sunset at the top of the mountain. I' m convinced that you will enjoy yourself when climbing the mountain. During the trip, I'll will bring you to a famous restaurant to eat the local food. All in all, you will get much relaxation.
I' m looking forward to receiving your favorable reply!
小库考场 Exercise 你是李华。你暑假在伦敦学习，得知当地美术馆要举办中国画展览，并正在招募志愿者。请给该美术馆写一封申请信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)表明写信目的； (2)陈述个人优势。 参考词汇：art gallery(美术馆),recruit(招募)
Exercise 你是学生会主席李华。你校将组织美国交换生参观中国美术馆。请给美国交换生写一则通知，内容包括以下要点：
(1)活动的具体安排； (2)活动的意义。
参考词汇：exchange student(交换生),the National Art Museum of China(中国美术馆)
Exercise 3 你是李华。目前你住在朋友 Eric 家里，你因有急事外出所以不能按时接收上周网购的笔记本电脑。请给他写一封电子邮件，内容包括以下要点：
(1)物品信息； (2)请他帮忙验货代收； (3)表示感谢。
Exercise 你是学生会主席李华。在外教 Brown 女士的帮助下，学生会举办的英语戏剧节圆满结束了。请给她写一封感谢信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)表达感谢； (2)大家的收获。 参考词汇：Drama Festival(戏剧节)
Exercise 5 你是李华。为了丰富校园生活，你校即将举办一场中国传统服装秀，你的美国朋友 Robert 对中国传统服装一直很感兴趣。请给他写一封邀请信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)活动时间和地点； (2)活动目的和内容。 参考词汇：fashion show(服装秀)
xercise 6 你是李华。你的英国朋友Jim暑假将要来中国旅行，他希望你给他提一些建议，避免因为文化差异而导致误会。请给他写一封建议信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)欢迎他来中国旅行； (2)你的建议。
Exercise 你是李华。上周你参加了某旅行社组织的加利福尼亚州七日游，但你对此次旅行感到很不满意。请给该旅行社写一封投诉信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)说明存在的问题； (2)表达不满和期望。
Exercise 8 你是李华。你想应聘一家银行的高级客户经理。请写一份简历，内容包括以下要点：
(1)个人信息、求职目标； (2)教育背景、工作经历； (3)所获奖励、特长等。
参考词汇：career objective(求职目标),educational background(教育背景),senior account manager(高级客户经理)
Exercise 你是李华。你得知好朋友David获得了一等奖学金。请给他写一封祝贺信，内容包括以下要点：
(1)表示祝贺； (2)肯定他付出的努力； (3)期望他取得更大的成就。 参考词汇：first-class scholarship(一等奖学金)
Exercise 10 你是李华。你将参加英语学习俱乐部的一个活动，并且要在活动上分享自己的英语学习体会。请写一篇发言稿，内容包括以下要点：
(1)学习方法； (2)学习收获。 答案在线 Exercise Dear Sir or Madam, My name is Li Hua, a student from China. I am studying in London during the summer vacation. I' m glad to learn that the local art gallery will hold an exhibition of Chinese paintings and is recruiting volunteers. So I am writing to apply to do some voluntary work
for the exhibition. I am good at English and familiar with Chinese paintings, which is helpful to promote cultural exchanges. I would like to guide visitors, introduce Chinese paintings and spread Chinese culture. My aim is to let Chinese culture go to the world and let the world understand Chinese culture.
I would appreciate it if you could agree to my request.
Yours, sincerely Li Hua NOTICE All the American exchange students, who are going to visit the National Art Museum of China, are expected to gather at the school gate at 8:30 this Saturday morning. The school bus will take you there.
You will first enjoy a series of paintings on the theme of “ Beautiful China", through which you will be amazed by China’s spectacular natural scenery. Then you will have the freedom to look around the art museum and choose the sections that appeal most to you. I believe it is a good chance for you to appreciate Chinese works of art and get a general idea of Chinese artists.
Hope you will enjoy the visit.
The Student Union Dear Eric, I think I need your help. Last Friday I bought a laptop online and it is expected to arrive at your address this Sunday. But you know I' m out to deal with some urgent business and I am going to London this weekend. It’' s not convenient for me to go back to receive the laptop at home. Can you do me the favor, please?
It's a Lenovo laptop made in China. Please give it a careful check and make sure the package is well preserved and the machine operates well. If you find any problems, please keep the evidence and tell me. Thank you very much.

text:
Yours, Li Hua Exercise Dear Ms. Brown, I' m writing to express my sincere gratitude for your kind help in the school's English Drama Festival, which has turned out to be an amazing success.
It's so nice of you to have taught us many presentation skills and basic stage techniques. Under your professional guidance , the participants gave such an impressive performance. Some students have overcome the fear of acting in front of the audience and gained tremendous confidence. Others have developed good communication skills and learned how to cooperate with each other in a team. Most importantly , this activity has aroused our passion for English drama.
Many thanks for your time and support.
Yours, Li Hua Exercise Dear Robert, To enrich our school life and raise our awareness of the beauty of traditional Chinese clothes , our school has scheduled a fashion show, which features traditional Chinese costumes dating back to the Han dynasty. During the show, you can see a variety of traditional Chinese clothes that were fashionable in different dynasties , and enjoy great dance performances. Knowing that you show a keen passion for Chinese culture, I' m sure you will be interested in this exciting event. By the way, the show will be held at the school stadium on
the evening of this coming Saturday, lasting about two hours.
Looking forward to your reply.
Yours, Li Hua Dear Jim, I' m glad to hear you are going to pay a visit to China during the summer vacation. In order to ensure that you have a pleasant trip and avoid misunderstanding due to cultural differences, I have some tips for you.
As we all know, language and cultural diversity are the biggest obstacles to travels, so you' d better learn some basic Mandarin in advance. Of course, if you can learn a few words of local dialects, it willbe much better. In addition, Chinese eating habits are very different from those in your country , so you' d better know about Chinese diets beforehand.
Welcome to China and wish you have a good time.
Yours sincerely, Li Hua Dear Sir or Madam, My name is Li Hua, a customer who took a seven-day trip to California organized by your travel agency last week. I' m writing to express my dissatisfaction.
To begin with, the guide took us to so many different places to do the shopping instead of visiting tourist atractions. Besides, I don't think the guide is suitable for the job because she had little knowledge of the places we visited and was even impolite to us. What was worse, the food during the trip was really bad.
I sincerely hope that you can take all the problems into consideration and improve your service in future.
Yours, Li Hua Resume Personal Information :
Name: Li Hua Date of Birth: Sept. 17,1995 Gender: Male Address: PO Box 237, Peking University, No. 5 Yiheyuan Road, Haidian District, Beijing Phone: xxxxxx E-mail: Lihua1995@ 163. com
Career Objective : Senior account manager
Educational Background :
2013. 9-2017. 7 Guanghua School of Management , Peking University, Bachelor of Management Main courses: English, Computer Science, Business Management, Accounting, International Commercial Law
Work Experience : 2020. 10-present Project Manager, Bank of Communications 2017. 9-2020. 9 Secretary of Marketing manager, Bank of China
Honors : 2019. 8 Outstanding Employee Award 2016. 9 National Encouragement Scholarship 2015.6 Excellent Student Award
Specialities : Singing, familiarity with office software and programming
Hobbies : Reading, singing and playing basketball
Personal Qualities : Honest, responsible, reliable
Dear David, How delighted I am when I hear that you have received the first-class scholarship! It must be a special and happy moment for you. Congratulations!
Everyone knows that the scholarship is the best affrmation of a student' s performance. I believe you really deserve the honor because you have made great effrts in your specialied field since you entered the universiy. Now, your diligence and intellience win you honor. I am happy for you from the bottom of my heart.
I am firmly convinced that as an up-and-coming person, you wil study harder to develop your academic career to a higher level in days to come. May you make even greater achievements !
Yours, Li Hua Exercise 10 Dear friends , In today' s world, being able to master a foreign language will be helpful. Here I' d like to share my English learning methods.
First, I think it's useful to learn English grammar and remember as many useful sentence patterns as possible. The more we read , the better our English will be. So I spend much time reading English newspapers and magazines after class, which helps improve my English. Besides, TV and radio programs are of great help. We can learn a lot of idiomatic English expressons from them. Learming English not only increases my awareness of foreign cultures but helps me to communicate with English-speaking people and to make more new friends. Hope all of us can improve our English dramatically.
Thank you. 附录一 词义辨析 (一)常见名词的用法与比较 英语中有些名词由于拼写、词义等相似或相近，常常被混用或误用，而这也往往是考试中名词部分的考查重点。
1.近形词 (1) basis, base, basement
basis 意为“原因，基准，方式，基础，基点"”，常用短语为“on the basis of(因为，以..….为由)"和“on a(n)...basis(以..…·的方式，按·……·的标准)”。base作名词时，意为“基地，总部，根基，根据”;作动词时，意为“以·….…·为据点(或总部等)”，常用短语为“base...on/upon...(以..….为.....的基础或根据)”。basement 意为“地下室”。
The basis of a good marriage is trust. 美满婚姻的基础是信赖。 The company has its base in New York, and branches all over the world. 这家公司的总部设在纽约，分公司遍布全世界。 She practised playing the piano in the basement. 她在地下室里练习弹钢琴。
(2)compliment, complement
compliment 既可作名词，也可作动词，意为“赞美，称赞”，作名词时常用短语为“pay sb.a compliment(对某人表示赞扬)”;作动词时常用短语为“compliment sb.on sth.(在某事上夸奖某人)”。complement 既可作名词，也可作动词，作名词时，意为“补足物，补充物，衬托物”，常与介词to搭配；作动词时，意为“补充，补足”。
We should pay her a compliment , because she performed well in the competition. 我们应该对她表示赞扬，因为她在比赛中表现良好。 This wine would be a very nice complement to grilled food. 这种葡萄酒配烧烤食物会很不错。
(3)contact, contract, contrast
这三个词既可作名词，也可作动词。contact 作名词时，意为“接触，(尤指经常的)联系”，常用短语为“keep in contactwith(与....保持联系)”“ contact between...and..(....与....之间的联系)”和“make/lose contact with(与....取得/失去联系)”;作动词时，为及物动词，意为“联系，联络(如用电话或信件)”。contract 作名词时，意为“合同，合约”，常与介词with,for或between 搭配;作动词时，意为“感染(疾病)，得(病),(使)收缩，缩小，订立..…·的合同(或契约)”。contrast作名词时，意为“明显的差异，对比，对照，明显不同的人(或事物)”，常与介词with,to或between 搭配，常用短语为“in contrast to(与...·形成对照)”和“bycontrast(相比之下)”;作动词时，意为“对比，对照，形成对比”，常与and或介词with搭配。
He lost contact with his friends last year. 去年他和他的朋友们失去了联系。 If you want to get feedback, you should contact your customers. 如果你想要获得反馈，你应该联系你的客户。 I had no choice but to sign the contract. 我别无选择，只好签了合同。 He contracted COVID-19 after going to a bar. 他去了一家酒吧后感染了新冠肺炎。 Black and white show a striking contrast. 黑和白形成了鲜明的对比。 She contrasted the previous situation with the present crisis. 她把先前的情况与现在的危机进行了对比。
(4) context, contest context意为“上下文，语境，(事情发生的)背景”。contest意为“竞争，比赛”。 You can usually guess the meaning of a word from its context. 你通常可以根据上下文猜出词义来。 Franklin decided to hold a contest to see who could write the best song. 富兰克林决定举行一场比赛，看谁能够写出最佳歌曲。
(5) exposure,expansion,exhibition,extension,expression, explosion
exposure 意为“面临，遭受(危险或不快)，揭露，暴露”，常与介词to搭配。expansion意为“扩张，扩大，膨胀，发展”，强调在规模、数量、重要性等方面的增加。exhibition 意为“(一批)展览品，展览，展出，(技能、感情、行为等的)表现”，常与介词of搭配。extension意为“扩大，延伸，延期”，强调在范围上的平面延伸或期限的延长，常与介词of搭配。expression 意为“表示，表达，表情”。explosion意为“爆炸，爆裂(声)，激增，(感情，尤指愤怒的)突然爆发”。
Prolonged exposure to the sun may cause skin cancer.
长时间晒太阳可能会导致皮肤癌。 The rapid expansion of cities can cause many social and economic problems. 城市的快速发展会带来许多社会和经济问题。 She says that the exhibition is held annually. 她说这个展览每年举行一次。 Many Filipinos see the bases as an extension of American colonial rule. 许多菲律宾人把这些基地看作是美国殖民统治的延伸。 His expression seemed funny. 他的表情看起来滑稽。 A gas explosion happened in this block last week. 上周这个街区发生了一起气体爆炸事件。
(6) inspiration, aspiration
inspiration意为“灵感，启发灵感的人(或事物)，鼓舞人心的人(或事物)”，常与介词for或to搭配。aspiration意为“志向，抱负”，常用复数形式，常与介词for搭配。
These events provided inspiration for his first novel.这些事件为他的第一部小说提供了灵感。
I didn’t realize you had political aspirations.我没有意识到你有政治上的抱负。
(7) latitude, altitude, gratitude, attitude, multitude
latitude意为“纬度”时，为不可数名词；其复数形式latitudes 意为“纬度地区”。altitude意为“海拔，(海拔高的)高处”。gratitude 意为“感激之情，感谢”，常用短语为“gratitude to sb.(对某人的感激)”和“gratitude for sth.(对某事的感激)”。attitude意为“态度，看法”，常与介词to或 towards 搭配。multitude 意为“大量，众多”，常用短语为“a multitude of(大量，众多)”。
In the middle to high latitudes rainfall has risen steadily over the past decades.
中高纬度地区的降雨量在过去的几十年间稳步上升。 We are flying at an altitude of 6,000 meters. 我们的飞行高度是6,000米。 I would like to express my gratitude to everyone present. 我想对所有在场的人表示感谢。 These people have a very positive attitude to life. 这些人的生活态度很积极。 A multitude of thoughts filled her mind.她的脑海里充满了众多想法。
(8) relativity, regularity, popularity, gravity
relativity 意为“相对性，相对论”。regularity意为“规律性，经常性，规律”，其前常用介词 with。popularity 意为“受欢迎，流行，普及”，常用短语为“popularity among/with sb.(受某人欢迎)”。gravity 意为“地球引力，重力，严重性，庄严”。
I attended a lecture on relativity, but I couldn't understand at all 我去听了一场关于相对论的讲座，但我根本不能理解。 Children can find the regularity in acquiring the knowledge of language. 儿童会在获得语言知识的过程中找出规律。 He enjoyed immense popularity with radio audiences. 他在广播听众中广受欢迎。 I could not conceal the gravity of the situation from her. 我不能向她隐瞒情况的严重性。
2.近义词 (1) accident, incident, event, occurrence
这组名词均可表示“事件”。accident多指一般事故，即意外的遭遇或偶然事件，如acar/road/traffic accident(车祸/公路事故/交通事故)。incident可以指日常生活中发生的不寻常的或讨厌的事情，也可以指严重事件或暴力事件(如犯罪、事故、袭击等)，还可以指两国间的摩擦、冲突等。event 可以指任何大小事件，尤指历史上特殊、重大的事件，也可以指体育运动的比赛项目、有计划的公开活动等。occurrence指生活中发生的一般的或偶然的事件。
In America about fifty thousand people die in car accidents every year 在美国每年约有5万人死于车祸。 There was a shooting incident near here last night. 昨晚在这附近发生了一起枪击事件。 This is one of the most important events in the history of mankind. 这是人类历史上最重大的事件之一。 Complaints seem to be an everyday occurrence. 投诉似乎成了天天发生的事。
(2) price, charge, cost, expense
source: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output

id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0041
text:
price作名词时常与介词of或for搭配，意为“价钱，价格”，主要指商品出售时所规定的价格，常用短语为“at a price(以高价，花大钱)”;也可表示“代价”，作此意思讲时用作单数，常用短语为“at any price(不惜任何代价，无论如何)”;作动词时，意为“给.…·定价”，常与介词at搭配。charge 意为"(商品和服务所需的)要价，收费”，主要指提供某些商品或服务而收取的费用，常与介词 for搭配，常用短语为“free of charge(免费)”;还可表示“指控，控告，指责，掌管，责任”，常用短语为“take chargeof(负责，掌管)”和“in charge of(照料，负责)”;作动词且意为“收(费)”时，常与介词 for 搭配，意为“控告，指责”时，常与介词with搭配。cost意为“价钱，成本，费用，代价”，包括物质生产的成本，生活的费用或做某事所付出的努力、代价等，常用短语为“atall cost/costs(不惜任何代价)”和“at any cost(无论如何)”。expense 意为“价钱，费用，开支”，常指为某事物实际支付费用的总数额，有时也指用于特定目的的花费，常用短语为“at great expense(花费大笔费用)”“at the expenseof(在牺牲或损害...的情况下)”和“living/household/medical/legal/travel expenses(生活费用/家庭开支/医疗费用/律师费用/差旅费)”。
The price of fuel keeps going up.燃料价格持续上涨。 They are very happy to give their services free of charge. 他们很乐意免费提供服务。 We must reduce production costs, or we'll lose money. 我们必须降低生产成本，否则我们将会损失金钱。 The garden was transformed at great expense.花园改建花了一大笔费用。
(3) prize, award, reward
prize意为“奖，奖金，奖品”，多指给予竞赛中获胜者的奖励。award意为“奖，奖金，奖品”，常指经评判者(或小组)评定后给予满足某些条件的人(如表演者或参赛者等)的荣誉，多用于奖项名称中，常与介词for搭配。reward意为“奖励，报酬，悬赏金”，指某人因付出辛劳或做了好事而得到的奖励、酬金或回报。
He won first prize in the guitar section.他获得了吉他组一等奖。 He received a special award for his outstanding works as a movie director. 作为电影导演，他因其杰出的作品获得了一项特别奖。 The passer-by received a reward for saving the pet' s life. 因救了这只宠物的命，这位路人得到了一笔酬金。
(4) profession, occupation, job, work, employment, post, position, career
这组名词均可表示“职业，工作”。profession 意为“行业，职业”，指需要专门技能或特殊训练的职业，尤指受过较高教育的人才能从事的职业。occupation 意为“职业，工作”，指一般人日常所从事的职业，工作的种类较为广泛。job 意为“工作”，一般用来指各种形式的有收入、有报酬的工作，为可数名词。work意为“工作，活计”，是非常广泛的用语，指任何一种体力或脑力劳动的工作，作此意思讲时为不可数名词。employment 意为“职业，工作，就业”，指通过为别人工作而领取薪水的工作，含有“雇用”之意。post 和 position一般指在公司中的职位或工作，是正式用语，post 尤指大型机构内重要的岗位;position 通常指机构中的职位，尤指高级职位，通常不用于指一般的工作，该词也常用于工作申请、职位说明和招聘广告中。career意为“生涯，职业，事业”。
She was at the very top of her profession.她是她那个行业中的依者。 Many middle-aged women have no fixed occupations.许多中年女性没有固定的职业。 The students are seeking for summer jobs.这些学生正在寻找暑期工作。 There isn’t a lot of work at this time of the year.每年这个时候工作都不多。 Graduates find it more and more difficult to find employment.
毕业生感到找工作越来越难。 She resigned her post as hotel manager in Hilton.
她辞去了在希尔顿酒店担任的酒店经理一职。 I would like to apply for the position of sales director.我想申请销售部主管一职。 She started her career as an English teacher.她开始了作为一名英语教师的职业生涯。
(5) travel, journey, tour, trip, voyage, excursion, expedition
travel 意为“旅行，旅游”，是旅行的统称，泛指旅行、游历、旅游，无路程的含义。journey 意为“旅行，行程”，是较正式的用语，主要指陆地上行程远、时间长或经常性的旅行。tour意为“旅行，旅游”，指为游玩而到各个地方观光的或长或短的旅行，常与介词of,round或 around搭配;tour还有“巡回比赛(或演出等)”之意，常用短语为“on tour(进行巡回访问，进行巡回演出)”。trip 意为“旅行，旅游”，是非正式用语，常指短期的旅行或观光，而且通常最后要返回出发地，常用短语为“go on atrip(去旅游)”和“take a trip(旅行)”。voyage 意为“航行”，是较正式的用语，尤指航海或航天。excursion 意为“(尤指集体)远足，短途旅行”，指集体的娱乐性的短途旅行，常用短语为“go on an excursion(去旅行)”。expedition 意为“远征，探险，考察”，指以探险等为目的，尤指寻找不为人知的地方的有组织的旅行。
He says that his wife likes travel. 他说他妻子喜欢旅行。 The journey wiltake a long time.这趟旅行将花费很长时间。 We will have a 50-day tour around the world. 我们将进行一场为期五十天的环球旅行。 I'm planning a trip to Hong Kong.我正打算去香港旅行。 The ship set out on a long voyage.这艘船开始了远航。 We went on an all-day excursion to Beijing.我们到北京进行了一日游。 It won't be labeled in any way as a military expedition. 它无论如何也称不上是一次军事远征。
(6) option, choice, alternative, selection, preference
option 意为“可选择的事物，选择，选择权”，常常侧重于已经被权威等授予的一种选择能力或自由，常与介词of搭配，该词也指计算机程序里的选项、选择。choice 意为“选择，挑选，选择权，选择的可能性”，表示从两个或更多的可能性中进行挑选，也可表示选择的权利。alternative 意为“可供选择的事物”，指从两个或更多的可能性中做出的选择。selection 意为“挑选，选拔，可供选择的事物”，指从大的群体中选出来的人或物，着重强调选择者的识别力或鉴赏力。preference意为“偏爱，爱好，喜爱，偏爱的事物”，指基于个人价值观、偏见或偏好上的选择，不一定很理性，常与介词for搭配。
Students have the option of studying abroad in their second year. 学生在二年级时可以选择出国学习。 Voters have a choice among three main political parties. 选民可以在三大政党之间做出选择。 You have the alternative of leaving or staying here. 你可以选择离开或留在这里。 We left the selection of the team members to the captain. 我们把挑选队员的工作留给了队长。 Many people expressed a strong preference for the original plan. 许多人强烈表示喜欢原计划。
(7) outcome, result, effect, consequence
这组名词均可表示“结果”。outcome强调事件、行动或过程的结果、效果，表示最终的结果。result是普通用语，指直接或间接、近因或远因所引起的结果，可指好的或坏的结果;还可表示科学实验或研究的结果、成果。effect指由某种原因直接导致的结果，sideeffects意为“(药物的)副作用”。consequence指自然而然的或理所当然的(不良)结果或后果。
We are waiting for the final outcome of the negotiations.我们正在等待谈判的最终结果 Spelling mistakes are often just the result of carelessness. 拼写错误大多只是粗心造成的。 He began to experience the evil effects of drinking.他开始体会到喝酒的恶果了。 If climate change continues, we will suffer the consequences. 如果气候变化持续下去，我们将会自食其果。
(8) scene, view, sight, scenery, landscape
这组名词均有“风景，景色”之意。scene指具有一定特征的、具体的、局部的各种常见的风光或景色，也可指现场，尤指不愉快事件发生的地点。view主要指从某一角度或某一距离看到的景色，尤指乡间美景，常与介词of搭配;还可指“(个人的)看法，意见”，常与介词 about 或 on 搭配。sight既可以指看得见的事物、景象，尤指壮观的景象，又可以指名胜、风景，表示“名胜，风景”时，习惯上要用复数形式。scenery 指某一国家或某一地区的整体自然风景，为不可数名词。landscape 指陆地上有山、有水的自然风光，尤指乡村的风景或景色，常用单数形式。
There are some pretty scenes in the park.公园里有几处赏心悦目的景色。 There isalovelyviewfrom thiswindow.从这个窗户可以看到一片秀丽的景色。 The Great Wall is one of the most breathtaking sights in the world. 长城是世界上最令人叹为观止的名胜之一。 The West Lake is remarkable for its beautiful scenery. 西湖以其美景而引人瞩目。 The two hills with the valley form a dramatic landscape. 两座小山连同山谷构成了一幅引人入胜的风景。
(9) look, sight, view, glance, glimpse
这组名词均有“看”之意。look既可表示“看”的动作，常与介词at搭配，又可表示“神情，样子，相貌”。sight作“看见”讲时，常用短语为“catch sight of(看见)”“at first sight(乍一看，初次见到)”和“at the sight of(一看到)”;还有“视野，视力范围”之意，表示视觉所接收的景象，强调目的物进入了眼帘，常用短语为“come in sight of(看到)”“in sight(在视野内，看得见)”和“out of sight(在视野外，看不见)”。view作“看，视野，视线”讲时，常用短语为“come into view/be in view(映入眼帘，看见)”。glance既可作名词，也可作动词，有“一警，匆匆一看，扫视”之意，多与介词at搭配，强调动作过程，常用短语为“take/have a glance at(匆匆看一眼)”“at first glance(乍一看)”“at a glance(立刻，一眼)”和“glance at(警)”。glimpse 作名词时，表示“一警，一看”，常用短语为“catch/get a glimpse of( 臀见)”，指无意识地看，强调动作结果;作动词时，意为“警见，看一眼”，为及物动词。
The old city has taken on a new look.旧城换新貌。 She saw her friends off, waving until the car was out of sight. 她给她的朋友们送行，一直挥手直到轿车从视野中消失。 The moment I turned my car, a beautiful lake came into view. 我的轿车一转弯，一个美丽的湖就映入了眼帘。 He took a glance at it, and then he told me to look again. 他匆匆朝它看了一眼，然后叫我再看看。 The movie star's fans have waited 4 hours outside the hotel to catch a glimpse of her. 为了一睹这位电影明星的风采，她的粉丝已在宾馆外等了4个小时。
(10) manner, means, method, way, approach
这组名词均有“方式，方法”之意。manner多指行动的特殊方式或独特的方法，其前通常用介词in;还可指“礼貌，礼仪”，此时应用其复数形式 manners，常用短语为“have good/bad manners(有/没有礼貌)”。means 指为实现目的而采用的任何手段，或指使用某种交通工具的方式，单复数同形，常用短语为“by means of(借助....手段)”和“by no means(决不)”。method 指有条理的、系统的方法，还可指做某事的具体步骤或程序，其前通常用介词 with，其后常接介词 of 或 for。way 的使用范围最广，其前常用介词 in，其后常跟 of doing sth./to do sth.。approach 指待人接物或思考问题的方式，或解决某事的具体方法，其后常接介词to，此时介词to后跟名词(短语)、代词或动名词(短语)。
I' m a professional and I have to do things in a professional manner. 我是专业人士，必须以专业方式行事。 We express our thoughts by means of words. 我们用言语来表达思想。 I think we should try again with a different method. 我想我们应该用一种不同的方法再试一次。 In this way you can work out the problem quickly. 以这种方式你能很快地解决这个问题。 The school decides to adopt a different approach to the problem. 学校决定采取另外一种方式来解决该问题。
(11) cause,reason,excuse
这组名词均可表示“原因，理由”。cause 用于表示造成某一事实或现象的直接原因或起因，此时为可数名词，后面常接ofsth.;还可表示“理由，动机，缘故”，作此意思讲时为不可数名词，此时reason 可以和cause 换用，后面常接for sth.；也可表示“(支持或为之奋斗的)事业，目标”，作此意思讲时为可数名词。reason含有“理由，解释”的意思，指某事发生或做某事的原因、理由、解释、正当理由、道理，后面常接for(doing)sth.。excuse 指为免受指责或推卸责任而找的“理由，借口”，后面常接for(doing) sth. 。
Unemployment is a major cause of poverty.失业是贫困的主要原因。 She gave no reasons for her decision.她没有对她的决定做出任何解释。 I'm tired of listening to his excuses for his laziness.我听厌了他为自己的懒惰找的借口。
(12) power, force, strength, energy
这组名词均有“力量”之意。power是普通用词，泛指一切力量;也可指对人或事物的控制能力，意为“控制力，影响力，操纵力”，常与介词over 搭配;还可表示“统治，政权”，常用短语为“take/seize/lose power(掌握/夺取/失掉政权)”和“come topower(当选执政)”。force通常指外力，如物体相撞时产生的力量;也可表示“武力，暴力”;还可表示“部队，武装部队”，此时为可数名词。strength 指内部固有的力量;还可以表示“优势，长处”。energy 常用来形容某人的力量、活力、精力;还可表示“能源”，作此意思讲时为不可数名词，常用短语为“solar energy(太阳能)”“nuclear energy(核能)”和“energy crisis(能源危机)”。
Adultsknow the power oflove.成年人懂得爱的力量。 He overcame his bad habits by force of will.他靠意志力克服了自己的坏习惯。 He pushed against the rock with all his strength.他用全力推那块石头。 Where do those kids get their energy from？那些孩子哪里来的精力？
(13) sign, mark, symbol
这组名词均有“记号，象征，符号”之意。sign为普通用词，指人们公认的事物的记号，也可指某种情况的征兆。mark为普通用词，含义广泛，既可指为便于辨认而有意做的标记，又可指事物留下的印迹或有别于其他事物的特征。symbol指表示声音、数量、化学物质等的字母、数字或记号。
Equations are generally written with an equal sign. 等式通常用等号来写。 Make a mark in the margin. 在页边做个记号。 What is the chemical symbol for copper? 铜的化学符号是什么？
(14) fault, mistake, error
这组名词均可表示“错误”。fault 意为“责任，过错，过失”，常用短语为“find fault with(挑剔，指责，找碴儿)”;还可表示“弱点，缺点，缺陷，毛病”。mistake意为“错误，失误”，常指言语、行为、用词或数字等方面的错误、失误，常用短语为“make amistake/make mistakes(犯错)”和“bymistake(错误地，无意中)”。error意为“错误，差错”，比 mistake更加正式，尤指引起问题或影响结果的错误，常用短语为“make an error(出差错)”和“in error(错误地，失误地)”。
I feel very disappointed whenever my boss finds fault with my work. 每当老板挑我工作上的毛病时，我都感觉很沮丧。 We may have made a mistake in our calculations. 我们的计算中可能有一处算错了。 No payments were made last week because of a computer error. 由于计算机出错，上周未付任何款项。
(15) rate, pace, speed
这组名词均可表示“速度”。rate 意为“进度，速度”，主要指事物运动、变化的速度，常用短语为“"a...ate(以...的速度)”;还有“比率，率”之意。pace 意为“速度，步速，节奏”，多指人或物移动的速度，也可指活动、进步、发展等的步伐、节奏，常用短语为“"at..pace以..的速度)"“keep pace with(与..并驾齐驱，与....步调一致"和“pace of(..的节奏)"”。 speed 意为"((运动、发生或进行的)速度”，常用短语为“at high/low/full/top speed(以高速/低速/全速/最高速)”。
The number of criminal activities is increasing at an alarming rate 犯罪活动的数量正在以惊人的速度增长。 Many people prefer the relaxed pace of life in the countryside. 许多人都喜爱乡间那悠闲的生活节奏。 The train began to pick up speed.火车开始加速了。
(16) temper, mood, emotion, feeling, passion
temper 意为“脾气，易怒的性情，怒气，心情”，常用短语为“lose/keep one's temper with sb.(对某人发脾气/忍住怒火)”“ina temper(发脾气)”和“in a good/bad temper(心情好/不好)”。mood 意为“情绪，心情”，常用短语为“in a good/bad mood(心情好/不好)”“in the mood for(有心情)”和“in no mood for doing sth./to do sth.(没有心情做某事)”。emotion 意为“激情，情绪，强烈的感情”。feeling意为“(内心和感官的)感觉，感触”，其复数形式feelings 意为“感情，情感”;还有“看法，态度，意见”之意。passion意为“激情，强烈情感”；也可表示“酷爱”，此时常与介词for搭配。
She lost her temper with a customer and shouted at him. 她对一位顾客发了脾气，冲着他大喊大叫。 She’s in a good mood today.她今天心情很好。 They expressed mixed emotions at the news.他们对这个消息表现出复杂的感情。 He hates talking about his feelings.他讨厌谈论他的感情。 He is speaking with great passion.他正在激情洋溢地讲话。
(17) origin, root, source, resource
source: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output

id: 4--2023年广东省普通高校专升本考试专用教材·英语_parsed_output-0042
text:
origin意为“起源，源头”;还可表示“身世，出身”。root意为“根源，起因”，可以指问题或困境产生的原因，还可以指抽象事物的根源或来源。source 意为“来源，出处，起源，根源，源头”，常用短语为“renewable energy sources(可再生能源)”。resource 意为“资源，资料”，常用短语为“natural resources(自然资源)”和“human resources(人力资源)”。
They are very interested in the origins of life on earth. 他们对地球上生命的起源很感兴趣。 We have to figure out the root of the problem.我们必须弄清楚问题的根源。 Your local library will be a useful source of information. 你们当地的图书馆将是有用的资料来源。 The government should control the exploitation of minerals and other natural resources. 政府应该控制矿物和其他自然资源的开采。
(18) doubt, suspicion, distrust, uncertainty
doubt 作名词时，常与介词 about搭配，意为“疑惑，疑问”，指对事物的真假有怀疑;也可表示“不确定，不相信”;作动词时，意为“无把握，不能肯定，怀疑”，后可跟if,whether,that 等引导的宾语从句。suspicion 意为“怀疑，嫌疑”，语气较强，指对某人做某事的目的、意图有怀疑，也可指因没有确凿的证据而产生的怀疑。distrust 意为“不信任，怀疑”，指因对某人或某事不信任而感到怀疑，其后常接介词of;作动词时为及物动词。uncertainty意为“犹豫，迟疑，无把握”，侧重指在作决定时犹豫不决，或对某事没有把握。
There is some doubt about the best way to do it. 在做这件事的最佳方法上有一些疑问。 He was arrested on suspicion of murder.他因涉嫌谋杀而被捕。 Theylooked at each other with distrust.他们心怀戒备地相互看着对方。 There is considerable uncertainty about the company' s future. 这家公司的前景相当渺茫。
(19) inquiry, investigation, research, survey
inquiry 意为“调查，查究，查问，打听”，指正式调查，也可指一般的打听或询问，可以写作 enquiry，常用短语为“inquiryinto(调查)”“inquiry from(向..…·调查)”和“inquiry about(打听)”。investigation 意为“(正式的)调查，侦查”，一般指系统地进行调查以得到事实或想要的结果，常用短语为“make an investigation into(调查)”和“under investigation(接受调查)”。research意为“研究，调查，探索”，常与介词into 或on搭配，多指科学工作者为揭示自然规律或获取某个领域的知识而进行的长时间的调查研究，为不可数名词。survey意为“民意调查，民意测验”，指以提问或问卷的形式对某一人群的观点或行为所展开的调查，常用短语为“conduct/carry out a survey(进行一项民意调查)”。
These comments are not directly relevant to this inquiry 这些意见与这项调查没有直接联系。 The police have completed their investigations into the accident. 警方已完成了对这次事故的调查。 He has carried out extensive research into renewable energy sources. 他已经对可再生能源进行了广泛的研究。 The recent survey suggests that people are very confused about what they should eat to stay healthy. 最近的民意调查表明人们对于保持健康该吃什么很困惑。
(20) wound, injury, hurt, damage, harm
wound 意为“(武器造成的、身体上的或心灵上的)伤，伤口”，多指皮肉伤或精神创伤。injury 意为"(意外事故或袭击对躯体造成的、对感情、名誉等造成的)伤害，损伤”。hurt 意为“心灵创伤，委屈”。damage 意为“(有形的)损坏，破坏，损失，伤害，损害”，其后常接介词to，既可指物质上的破坏，也可指精神上的损害。harm 意为“伤害，损害”，多指由人或事引起的肉体或精神上的伤害，还可用于抽象事物。
The nurse cleaned the wound.护士清洗了伤口。 Two players are out of the match because of injury.两名队员因伤退出了比赛。 It was a hurt that would take a long time to heal.那是需要很长时间才能愈合的创伤。 The storm didn’tdo much damage.这场暴风雨并未造成严重损失。 He may look fierce,but he means no harm.他可能看上去很凶，但并无恶意。
(21) gaze, glare, stare
这三个词既可作名词，也可作动词。gaze 意为“凝视，注视”，指因惊讶或思考其他事情而长时间无意识的凝视、注视。glare 意为“怒视，瞪眼”，指长时间用愤怒的目光凝视着某人或某物。stare 意为“町，凝视，注视”，尤指不友好或吃惊的盯、凝视或注视。
She felt increasingly uncomfortable under the woman's gaze. 在那个女人的凝视下，她感到愈发不舒服。 She gaveher opponent ahostile glare.她含敌意地瞪着自己的对手。 Sara gave the man a long, cold stare. 萨拉冷冷地盯着那位男士看了很久。
(22) affair, business, matter
affair意为“事件，事情”，指人们谈论或以特别的方式描述的事情；还可表示“公共事务，政治事务”，此时应用复数形式affairs。business 意为“职责，商务，生意，事情”，常用作不可数名词，多指商业、生意上的事情，常用短语为“none of one’sbusiness(不关某人的事)”;还可表示“商业机构，企业，公司”，作此意思讲时为可数名词，常用短语为“have/start/run abusiness(拥有/开办/经营企业)”。matter 意为“事情，问题”，是可数名词，通常指必须要考虑或处理的事情，强调客观存在的事物。
The newspapers exaggerated the whole affair wildly.报纸过分夸大了整个事件。 It is the business of the police to protect the safety of the community. 警察的职责是保护社区安全。 They had some important matters to discuss. 他们有些重要的问题要讨论。
(23)voice, sound,noise
voice 意为“嗓音，说话声，歌唱声”，尤指人的声音，一般不用于指动物的声音。sound意为“声音，响声”，泛指耳朵能听到的任何声响。noise意为“声音，响声，噪音，吵闹声”，特指不悦耳的、令人不快的声音。
I could hear voices in the next room.我能听到隔壁房间里说话的声音。 She heard the sound of footsteps outside.她听见外面有脚步声。 People living in big cities are used to the noise from the traffic. 住在大城市里的人们习惯了车辆往来的噪音。
(24) fee, allowance, earnings, income, wage, salary, pay
fee意为“专业服务费，咨询费，报酬”，指提供某种服务收取的固定费用，常用短语为“legalfees(律师费)”和“tuitionfees(学费)”;还可以表示“(加入组织或做某事付的)费”。allowance意为“津贴，补贴”，指收入中的补贴部分。earnings 意为“薪水，工资，收入”，多指通过劳动所得到的收人;还可以表示“利润，收益”。income 意为“收人，收益”，与 earnings 意思相近，但 income 更强调一个国家、地区或个人取得的可靠的固定收入，而 earnings 可指设法挣得的非固定收入。wage 意为“工资，工钱”，通常指体力劳动者按周领取的工资，多用复数形式。salary 意为“薪金，薪水”，通常指办公室工作人员、教师、医生等专业人员按月领取的薪水。pay意为“工资，薪水"，指某人做常规工作挣得的收人，含义较广，为不可数名词，常用短语为“a payincrease/rise/raise(加薪)”和“holiday pay(假日薪金)”。
The bank doesn’t charge afee for setting up an account.在这家银行开立账户不收费。 He received an allowance to cover his travel expenses.他收到一笔差旅费用补贴。 He claimed compensation for loss of earnings.他要求对收入的损失做出补偿。 Tourism is a major source of income for the area.旅游业是这个地区的主要收入来源。 Some of them earn below the minimum weekly wage.他们中的一些人挣的钱低于最低周薪。 She's now earning a good salary as an interpreter.她现在当口译员赚的薪水丰厚。 At the meeting, the workers made complaints about their pay and working conditions. 在这个会议上，工人们表达了对薪水和工作条件的不满。
(25) shortage,absence, scarcity, lack
这组名词均可表示“缺乏，不足”。shortage 意为“短缺，不足”，侧重指达不到规定的、需要的或已知应有的数量，常与介词of 搭配。absence 意为“不存在，缺乏”，指某物根本不存在或完全短缺，常用短语为“in the absence of(不存在，缺乏)”;也可表示“缺席”，指某人未到现场，常用短语为“in one’s absence(某人不在时)”和“absence from(缺席)”。scarcity 意为“不足，缺乏，稀少”，指因产量不足或缺乏某物而难以应付或满足需要，常与介词of搭配。lack 意为“匮乏，短缺”，指部分或完全不足，常与介词of搭配。
Some companies are suffering from a shortage of funds.一些公司正遭受资金不足之苦。 The case was dismissed in the absence of proof.此案因缺乏证据而不予受理。 Everyone should pay attention to the problem of an ever increasing scarcity of water. 每个人都应该关注水资源越来越匮乏的问题。 Despite his lack of experience, he got the job. 尽管缺乏经验，他还是得到了那份工作。
She suffers deeply from a lack of confidence.她深受缺乏自信心之苦。
(26) issue, subject, theme, topic
issue 意为“重要议题，争论的问题”，指有争论或急需讨论、研究的热点话题。subject 意为“主题，话题”，使用范围广泛，指书籍、文章、演讲、讨论等中所隐含的、暗示的，需要由读者或听众推断的主题或中心话题;还可表示“学科，科目”。theme 意为“(演讲、文章或艺术作品的)题目，主题”，多指文学、艺术作品的主题，或论文、演说的主题。topic 意为“题目，话题”，用法没有 subject广泛，既可指文章或讲话的题目，也可指谈话的内容，还可指提纲中的标题、段落的主题或中心思想。
This is a big issue and we need more time to think about it. 这是个重大问题，我们需要花更多的时间考虑它。 We seem to have got off the subject we should discuss. 我们似乎偏离了应当讨论的话题。 North American literature is the main theme of this year' s art festival. 北美文学是今年艺术节的主题。 Her favorite topic of conversation is shopping. 她最喜欢谈论的话题是购物。
(27) emergency, crisis, urgency
emergency意为“突发事件，紧急情况”，强调突如其来的严重的或危险的事故或情况，常用短语为“in an emergency(在紧急情况下)”。crisis 意为“危机，危急关头”，着重强调某一事故或情况关系到生死存亡。urgency 意为“紧迫，迫切性”，指一种紧急的状态，a mater of urgency 相当于 an emergency 。
This entrance can be used in an emergency.
此入口能在紧急情况下使用。 Her best qualities came out in a crisis.她的优秀品质在危机中显示了出来。
This is a matter of some urgency. 这件事相当紧迫。
(28) facility, equipment, appliance
这组名词均可表示“设备”。facility 常用复数形式，指可供使用的设备或设施，常用短语为“sports/leisure/conferencefacilies(体育/消闲/会议设施)”。equipment指生产、研究等特定目的或活动所需要的设备、装备，如各种机器和器材，为不可数名词。appliance 侧重指家用器械或设备，尤指家用电器，为可数名词，常用短语为“electrical/household appliances(电器/家用器具)”。
The sports facilities at that club include tennis courts and a swimming pool.
那家俱乐部的体育设施包括网球场和一个游泳池。
The equipment of the photographic studio was expensive.这个摄影室的装备昂贵。 There’s plenty of space for all the kitchen appliances.有足够的空间摆放所有厨房器具。
(29) engagement, appointment, date
这组名词均有“约会”之意。engagement 尤指正式的或与工作有关的约会;还可表示“订婚，订婚期间”。appointment 通常指严格根据时间表上预约的时间进行的约见或约会，其目的主要是讨论公事或业务问题。date 主要指朋友之间的随便约见或男女之间的约会。
He will have a number of social engagements next week.他下周将有几次社交约会。
She has an appointment with her accountant.她和她的会计师有个约会。 I”ve got a date withLucy tomorrow night.明天晚上我与露西有个约会。
(30) habit, custom, practice, convention, tradition
habit意为“习惯，惯常行为，习性”，常指某人反复地做某种动作，久而久之形成的自然习惯或习性，行动时不假思索，常用短语为“develop/form the habit of doing sth.(养成/形成做某事的习惯)”“in the habit of doing sth.(习惯于做某事)”和“out ofhabit(出于习惯)”。custom具有habit的上述含义，但更为正式；还可表示“风俗，习俗”，指群体经过一段时期不断沿用而成为习惯或惯例，其后常跟 of doing sth.。practice 表示“习惯，通常的做法，惯例”，常指习惯性的做法或行为;还可表示“实践”。convention 意为“习俗，惯例”，多指一个社会中约定俗成的行为规则或公认的标准。tradition意为“传统，传统的信仰(或风俗)”，广义上指世代相传的伦理、行为规范和生活方式，特指因长久奉行而几乎具有法律效力的习惯、习俗，侧重历史意义。
You need to change your dietary habits.你需要改变你的饮食习惯。 It is the custom of giving presents at Christmas in Western countries. 在西方国家有在圣诞节赠送礼物的习俗。 It is his practice to read several books a week.他习惯于每周读几本书。 She is a young woman who enjoys ignoring social conventions. 她是一位喜欢无视社会习俗的年轻女子。 There's a tradition in our family that we get together on New Year's Eve. 我们家有个传统：在除夕我们聚在一起。
(31) ability,capacity, capability, competence
这组名词均可表示“能力”。ability 为常用词，指一个人先天的或学来的各种能力，其后常跟 to do sth.。capacity 侧重指人的潜在能力，通常不指体力，多指才智，尤指接受、领悟、理解或办事能力，其后常跟 for(doing) sth.或to do sth.。capability 多指一个人胜任某项具体工作的能力，也指本身具有但尚未发挥出来的潜在能力，其后常跟 of doing sth.或 to do sth.;还可表示“(国家的)军事力量”。competence 强调做某事的非凡能力，其后常跟in(doing)sth.。
I try to do my job to the best of my ability.我尽全力做好我的工作。 Our capacity for giving care, love and attention is limited. 我们给予照顾、爱护和关心的能力是有限的。 Age affects a person's physical and mental capability.年龄影响着一个人的体能和智能。 You should try to maintain your professional competence. 你应当尽力保持自己的专业能力。
(32) genius, gift, talent
这组名词均可表示“天才，天赋”。genius 指最高的、最全面的、最富于创造性的才能;还可表示“天才人物，(某领域的)天才”。gift 比较着重“天赋”，指某一方面的比较特殊的天赋、才能，为可数名词，常与介词 for 搭配。talent 比较着重“才能”，常与介词 for搭配;还可表示“有才能的人”。
Where do you draw the line between genius and madness? 天才和疯狂之间在哪里划界呢？ She has a great gift for music. 她极有音乐天赋。 Her energy and talent took her to the top of her profession. 她凭着精力和才能达到了事业的顶峰。
(33)responsibility, obligation, duty
这组名词均可表示“基于法律、道德要求的责任，义务”。responsibility 指按照社会习惯或本人良心的要求，必须对后果负责的职责或义务。obligation指除受法律或社会习惯等约束之外，还受诺言、誓言、契约、合同等约束的责任或义务。duty指对自己、他人应尽的义务，还常指自己具体工作岗位上的职责、任务，此时常用复数形式duties。
You must accept full responsibility if anything happens to the child. 如果孩子出了什么事，你要负全责。 The government has at least a moral obligation to answer these questions. 政府至少在道义上有责任回应这些问题。 It is my duty to report it to the police. 把这事报告给警方是我的责任。
(34) surroundings , environment, atmosphere , circumstance
surroundings 意为“环境”，只有复数形式，指人、物或地方周围的一切。environment 意为“环境，客观环境”，常指影响个体或事物行为或发展的环境。atmosphere 意为“气氛，氛围”，强调心理上感受到的周围的情况、环境或气氛。circumstance 意为“条件，环境，状况”，常用作复数，强调和某状况、某事件或某行为等有关的客观环境和条件。
The buildings have been designed to blend in with their surroundings. 这些建筑物被设计得与其周围环境协调一致。 An unhappy home environment can affect a child's behavior. 不幸福的家庭环境会对孩子的行为造成影响。 The atmosphere at lunch was relaxed. 午餐时的气氛是轻松的。 I know I can trust her in any circumstance. 我知道我在任何情况下都能信任她。
